Untitled Project
GHOST SuperPrompt Projection and Prompt Builder Requirements
Traceability
  • VIEWS
  • Document
  • Table
  • Traceability
  • Deep Traceability

    • 1. 1. Purpose, Scope, and Current Implementation Map
    This document defines the detailed current requirements for SuperPrompt projection, prompt-ready rendering, and the live Prompt Builder workflow through A4.

    Current implementation truth is derived from the provided source files, primarily:

    - ragstream/orchestration/super_prompt.py;
    - ragstream/orchestration/superprompt_projector.py;
    - ragstream/app/pipeline_runner.py;
    - ragstream/app/controller.py;
    - ragstream/app/ui_actions.py;
    - ragstream/app/ui_streamlit.py;
    - ragstream/retrieval/retriever_mem.py; and
    - the A2, A3, and A4 stage implementations that write into SuperPrompt.
    • GHOST-CONTEXT-INTEGRATION-ROOT
      1.1. Context Integration and Prompt Assembly Scope UID: GHOST-CONTEXT-INTEGRATION-ROOT STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
      • GHOST-SRS-FILE-TREE Requirement File Tree Parent Anchor
      RELATIONS (Child):
      • GHOST-CONTEXT-INTEGRATION-PRODUCT-NAME Product and Package Naming Boundary
      • GHOST-CONTEXT-INTEGRATION-SOURCE-AUTHORITY Current Code Source Authority
      • GHOST-CONTEXT-INTEGRATION-CHILDREN Child Requirement Documents
      • GHOST-CONTEXT-INTEGRATION-STAGE-4 Fourth High-Level Functional Stage
      • GHOST-CONTEXT-INTEGRATION-REQUEST-PRIORITY Current Request Priority
      • GHOST-CONTEXT-INTEGRATION-SUPPORTING-CONTEXT Supporting Context Categories
      • GHOST-CONTEXT-INTEGRATION-NO-CONTEXT-FABRICATION No Fabricated Context
      • GHOST-CONTEXT-INTEGRATION-NO-FINAL-ANSWER No Final User Answer
      • GHOST-CONTEXT-INTEGRATION-RUNTIME-ONLY Runtime-Only Integration State
      • GHOST-CONTEXT-INTEGRATION-CURRENT-PROJECTOR Current Projection Authority
      • GHOST-CONTEXT-INTEGRATION-CURRENT-RUNNER Current Prompt Builder Runner Boundary
      • GHOST-CONTEXT-INTEGRATION-CURRENT-OUTPUT Current Engineered Prompt Output
      • GHOST-CONTEXT-INTEGRATION-CURRENT-NO-GLOBAL-VALIDATOR No Current Universal Integration Validator
      • GHOST-CONTEXT-INTEGRATION-CURRENT-HARD-RULE-BOUNDARY Current Hard Rule Boundary
      • GHOST-CONTEXT-INTEGRATION-FUTURE-SEND-ALIGNMENT Future Preview and Send Alignment
      • GHOST-CONTEXT-INTEGRATION-FUTURE-INSPECTABILITY Future Finalization Inspectability
      • GHOST-CONTEXT-INTEGRATION-FUTURE-NO-INVENTION No Invented Future Integration Details
      • GHOST-CONTEXT-INTEGRATION-AC-SEPARATION AC: Current Request and Context Separation
      • GHOST-CONTEXT-INTEGRATION-AC-OPTIONAL-PATHS AC: Optional Context Paths
      • GHOST-CONTEXT-INTEGRATION-AC-CURRENT-BOUNDARY AC: Current Implementation Boundary
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-ROOT SuperPrompt Projection and Prompt Builder Scope
      • GHOST-CONTEXT-VALIDATION-ROOT Context Validation Capability Scope
      • GHOST-HARD-RULES-ROOT Hard Rule Integration and Finalization Scope
      STATEMENT: GHOST shall provide a Context Integration and Prompt Assembly capability that receives the current structured SuperPrompt state and produces the engineered prompt representation used by the current Prompt Builder workflow.

      The capability shall integrate current-request content, configuration content, permitted ActiveBrief continuity content, synthesized Memory Context, condensed document evidence, optionally visible raw document evidence, and any already prepared attachment block.

      The capability shall not own prompt preprocessing, document retrieval, document evidence selection, memory retrieval, memory recording, durable memory storage, final user-answer generation, or external model-provider execution.
    GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-ROOT
    1.1. SuperPrompt Projection and Prompt Builder Scope UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-ROOT STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-CONTEXT-INTEGRATION-ROOT Context Integration and Prompt Assembly Scope
    RELATIONS (Child):
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-SOURCE-AUTHORITY Source-Code Authority
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-LEGACY-STUB Legacy PromptBuilder Stub Boundary
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-AUTHORITATIVE-STATE Authoritative Shared State
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-WRAPPER Stable Composition Wrapper
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-PROJECTOR-CONSTRUCTOR Projector Input Validation
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-DERIVED-LOGIC Derived Projection Logic Ownership
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-NO-STAGE-ALGORITHM-OWNERSHIP No Upstream Algorithm Ownership
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-QUERY-INPUTS Query Projection Inputs
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-A3-WRAPPER A3 Evaluation Wrapper
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-SYSTEM-HEADING System Section
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-CONFIG-SECTION Configuration Section
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-REQUEST-SECTION Current User Request Section
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-SUPPORT-SECTION Supporting Context Section
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-COMPOSE-SYSTEM System_MD Rebuild
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-COMPOSE-PROMPT Prompt_MD Rebuild
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-COMPOSE-ORDER prompt_ready Assembly Order
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-RUNNER-STEPS Current Executable Runner Steps
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-CURRENT-GUI-OUTPUT Current Operational Output
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-NO-SEND-IMPLEMENTATION No Completed External Send Boundary
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-A5-POSTPONED A5 Postponed Boundary
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-HARD-RULE-POSTPONED Global Hard Rule Integration Postponed
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-FUTURE-SEND-SAME-ASSEMBLY Future Send Uses Authoritative Assembly
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-FUTURE-NO-API-INVENTION No Invented Send API
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-NO-MISSING-CONTEXT-FABRICATION Missing Context Omission
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-NO-RAW-MEMORY-LEAK No Default Raw Memory Leakage
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-STRUCTURE-SAFETY Raw Evidence Structural Safety
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-NO-DURABLE-MUTATION No Durable Store Mutation
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-AC-ORDER AC: Composition Order
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-AC-A4-RAW-HIDDEN AC: Raw Document Evidence Hidden After A4
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-AC-RAW-MEMORY-HIDDEN AC: Raw Memory Hidden
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-AC-RUNNER AC: Runner Through A4
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-AC-CURRENT-BOUNDARY AC: No False Completion Claim
    STATEMENT: GHOST shall provide a projection and Prompt Builder capability that converts the current SuperPrompt state into retrieval-oriented projections, A3 comparison text, stage-visible engineered prompt previews, and the current final prompt_ready representation.

    This file shall define current implemented behavior through A4 and shall explicitly separate that behavior from the unfinished external LLM-call/send boundary, postponed A5 behavior, and future global Hard Rule integration.
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-SOURCE-AUTHORITY
      1.2. Source-Code Authority UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-SOURCE-AUTHORITY STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-ROOT SuperPrompt Projection and Prompt Builder Scope
      STATEMENT: The detailed behavior in this file shall follow the provided current Python source code and active runtime configuration.

      Legacy Prompt Builder descriptions shall be treated as intent only where they are not wired into the current runtime.
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-LEGACY-STUB
      1.3. Legacy PromptBuilder Stub Boundary UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-LEGACY-STUB STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-ROOT SuperPrompt Projection and Prompt Builder Scope
      STATEMENT: A legacy prompt_builder.py stub whose build method returns a placeholder value shall not be represented as the current operational prompt-assembly implementation.

      The current executable assembly path shall remain SuperPrompt.compose_prompt_ready() delegating to SuperPromptProjector.
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-AUTHORITATIVE-STATE
      2.1. Authoritative Shared State UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-AUTHORITATIVE-STATE STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-ROOT SuperPrompt Projection and Prompt Builder Scope
      RELATIONS (Child):
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-LIFECYCLE-FIELDS Lifecycle Projection Inputs
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-BODY-FIELDS Canonical Prompt Body Fields
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-EXTRAS Runtime Extras
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-QUERY-FIELD Effective Retrieval Query Field
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-ACTIVEBRIEF-FIELDS ActiveBrief Runtime Fields
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-MEMORY-FIELDS Memory Runtime Fields
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-DOCUMENT-FIELDS Document Runtime Fields
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-RENDERED-FIELDS Rendered Prompt Fields
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-RECENT-CONVERSATION-BOUNDARY recentConversation Current Boundary
      STATEMENT: SuperPrompt shall remain the authoritative shared runtime state for the active prompt-building run.

      SuperPromptProjector shall derive projections from SuperPrompt and shall not become a parallel owner of independent prompt truth.
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-WRAPPER
      3.1. Stable Composition Wrapper UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-WRAPPER STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-ROOT SuperPrompt Projection and Prompt Builder Scope
      STATEMENT: SuperPrompt.compose_prompt_ready() shall remain the stable public wrapper for central prompt-ready rendering and shall delegate to SuperPromptProjector for the current implementation.
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-PROJECTOR-CONSTRUCTOR
      3.2. Projector Input Validation UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-PROJECTOR-CONSTRUCTOR STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-ROOT SuperPrompt Projection and Prompt Builder Scope
      STATEMENT: SuperPromptProjector construction shall reject a missing SuperPrompt reference rather than creating an unbound projector.
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-DERIVED-LOGIC
      3.3. Derived Projection Logic Ownership UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-DERIVED-LOGIC STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-ROOT SuperPrompt Projection and Prompt Builder Scope
      STATEMENT: SuperPromptProjector shall own derived text projections from current SuperPrompt state, including retrieval query text, A3 comparison prompt text, system/configuration Markdown, current-request Markdown, supporting-context Markdown, and prompt_ready assembly.
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-NO-STAGE-ALGORITHM-OWNERSHIP
      3.4. No Upstream Algorithm Ownership UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-NO-STAGE-ALGORITHM-OWNERSHIP STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-ROOT SuperPrompt Projection and Prompt Builder Scope
      STATEMENT: SuperPromptProjector shall not own A2 selection, document retrieval, reranking, A3 usefulness classification, A4 condensation, memory candidate scoring, memory compression, or Memory Context synthesis.
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-QUERY-INPUTS
      4.1. Query Projection Inputs UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-QUERY-INPUTS STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-ROOT SuperPrompt Projection and Prompt Builder Scope
      RELATIONS (Child):
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-QUERY-STRONG Strong Prompt Query Projection
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-QUERY-WEAK-SAME Weak Same-Topic Query Projection
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-QUERY-WEAK-RELATED Weak Related-Domain Query Projection
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-QUERY-WEAK-IRRELEVANT Weak Irrelevant Query Suppression
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-QUERY-BLOCK-ORDER Query Block Order
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-QUERY-EMPTY-ERROR Unexpected Empty Query Error
      STATEMENT: Retrieval query projection shall read task, purpose, and context from SuperPrompt.body and shall read activebrief_prompt_materiality, activebrief_topic_relation, and activebrief_relation_activebrief from SuperPrompt.extras.
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-A3-WRAPPER
      5.1. A3 Evaluation Wrapper UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-A3-WRAPPER STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-ROOT SuperPrompt Projection and Prompt Builder Scope
      RELATIONS (Child):
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-A3-FULL-BRIEF A3 Full ActiveBrief Routes
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-A3-TITLE-ONLY A3 ActiveBrief Title-Only Routes
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-A3-NO-CONTEXT-FABRICATION A3 Missing ActiveBrief Handling
      STATEMENT: The A3 comparison projection shall wrap the current request and any permitted ActiveBrief continuity material inside one user_prompt_under_evaluation structure.
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-SYSTEM-HEADING
      6.1. System Section UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-SYSTEM-HEADING STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-ROOT SuperPrompt Projection and Prompt Builder Scope
      STATEMENT: System rendering shall emit a top-level System section and shall place the current body.system value directly below it when present.
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-CONFIG-SECTION
      6.2. Configuration Section UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-CONFIG-SECTION STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-ROOT SuperPrompt Projection and Prompt Builder Scope
      RELATIONS (Child):
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-EVIDENCE-POLICY-PRECEDENCE Evidence Policy Identifier Precedence
      STATEMENT: System rendering shall emit a Configuration section after the System section.

      When corresponding values are present, configuration lines shall be emitted in this order:

      1. Role;
      2. Audience;
      3. Tone;
      4. Depth;
      5. Confidence; and
      6. Evidence Policy identifier when the policy produces a rendered policy block.
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-REQUEST-SECTION
      7.1. Current User Request Section UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-REQUEST-SECTION STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-ROOT SuperPrompt Projection and Prompt Builder Scope
      RELATIONS (Child):
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-REQUEST-PRIORITY Current Request Priority Instruction
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-REQUEST-TASK Task Block
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-REQUEST-OPTIONALS Optional Request Blocks
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-REQUEST-NO-A2-IN-TASK Configuration Separation from Task
      STATEMENT: Prompt rendering shall emit a top-level Current User Request section after System and Configuration.
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-SUPPORT-SECTION
      8.1. Supporting Context Section UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-SUPPORT-SECTION STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-ROOT SuperPrompt Projection and Prompt Builder Scope
      RELATIONS (Child):
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-SUPPORT-EMPTY Empty Supporting Context Omission
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-ACTIVEBRIEF-SOURCE Previous-Conversation Projection Source
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-MEMORY-CONTEXT-SOURCE Memory Context Source Precedence
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-DOCUMENT-SUMMARY-SOURCE Document Summary Source
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-RAW-DOCUMENT-STAGES Raw Document Evidence Stage Visibility
      STATEMENT: When supporting content exists, the renderer shall emit a top-level Supporting Context section after the Current User Request and shall mark that material as supporting only.
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-COMPOSE-SYSTEM
      9.1. System_MD Rebuild UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-COMPOSE-SYSTEM STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-ROOT SuperPrompt Projection and Prompt Builder Scope
      STATEMENT: Each central composition call shall rebuild SuperPrompt.System_MD from current SuperPrompt state.
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-COMPOSE-PROMPT
      9.2. Prompt_MD Rebuild UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-COMPOSE-PROMPT STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-ROOT SuperPrompt Projection and Prompt Builder Scope
      STATEMENT: Each central composition call shall rebuild SuperPrompt.Prompt_MD from current SuperPrompt state.
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-COMPOSE-ORDER
      9.3. prompt_ready Assembly Order UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-COMPOSE-ORDER STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-ROOT SuperPrompt Projection and Prompt Builder Scope
      RELATIONS (Child):
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-COMPOSE-JOIN Prompt Part Separation
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-ATTACHMENTS Attachment Block Boundary
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-NO-FINAL-ANSWER Composition Is Not Answer Generation
      STATEMENT: The current central composer shall append non-empty prompt parts in this order:

      1. System_MD;
      2. Prompt_MD;
      3. rendered Supporting Context; and
      4. Attachments_MD.
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-RUNNER-STEPS
      10.1. Current Executable Runner Steps UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-RUNNER-STEPS STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-ROOT SuperPrompt Projection and Prompt Builder Scope
      RELATIONS (Child):
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-RUNNER-PROMPT-GUARD Prompt Input Guard
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-RUNNER-PROJECT-GUARD Active Project Guard
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-RUNNER-NEW-STATE New SuperPrompt at Preprocessing Start
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-RUNNER-MEMORY-RETRIEVAL Memory Retrieval in Retrieval Step
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-RUNNER-RERANK-PASSTHROUGH ReRanker Pass-Through
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-RUNNER-SNAPSHOTS Stage Snapshots
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-RUNNER-GUI-WRITEBACK GUI Prompt Preview Write-Back
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-RUNNER-STAGE-COMPOSITION Stage Composition Calls
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-RUNNER-HARD-RULE-VISUAL Hard Rule Visual Step Is Not Execution
      STATEMENT: The current live Prompt Builder runner shall execute these six steps in order:

      1. Pre-Processing;
      2. A2-PromptShaper;
      3. Retrieval;
      4. ReRanker or retrieval pass-through;
      5. A3 NLI Gate; and
      6. A4 Condenser.
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-CURRENT-GUI-OUTPUT
      11.1. Current Operational Output UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-CURRENT-GUI-OUTPUT STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-ROOT SuperPrompt Projection and Prompt Builder Scope
      STATEMENT: The current completed operational output of the provided Prompt Builder path shall be the GUI-visible engineered prompt stored in SuperPrompt.prompt_ready after A4.
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-NO-SEND-IMPLEMENTATION
      11.2. No Completed External Send Boundary UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-NO-SEND-IMPLEMENTATION STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-ROOT SuperPrompt Projection and Prompt Builder Scope
      STATEMENT: The provided current code shall not be represented as implementing a completed action that sends prompt_ready to a selected external LLM and returns the resulting answer.
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-A5-POSTPONED
      11.3. A5 Postponed Boundary UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-A5-POSTPONED STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-ROOT SuperPrompt Projection and Prompt Builder Scope
      STATEMENT: A5 shall remain a reserved lifecycle value and postponed future capability.

      The current runner shall not claim a completed A5 execution step or a finalized A5 function.
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-HARD-RULE-POSTPONED
      11.4. Global Hard Rule Integration Postponed UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-HARD-RULE-POSTPONED STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-ROOT SuperPrompt Projection and Prompt Builder Scope
      STATEMENT: Global Hard Rule integration shall remain disabled and planned for later in the current runtime baseline.

      Per-agent static JSON instructions named Hard Rules shall not be confused with the future global Hard Rules capability.
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-FUTURE-SEND-SAME-ASSEMBLY
      11.5. Future Send Uses Authoritative Assembly UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-FUTURE-SEND-SAME-ASSEMBLY STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-ROOT SuperPrompt Projection and Prompt Builder Scope
      STATEMENT: The approved future direction is that the actual model-call/send boundary shall consume the same authoritative deterministic prompt assembly represented to the user, so final-send content does not silently diverge from the inspectable engineered prompt.
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-FUTURE-NO-API-INVENTION
      11.6. No Invented Send API UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-FUTURE-NO-API-INVENTION STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-ROOT SuperPrompt Projection and Prompt Builder Scope
      STATEMENT: This document shall not invent the future model-provider API, model-selection contract, streaming behavior, response-capture behavior, retry policy, or failure semantics before those decisions are implemented or explicitly approved.
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-NO-MISSING-CONTEXT-FABRICATION
      12.1. Missing Context Omission UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-NO-MISSING-CONTEXT-FABRICATION STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-ROOT SuperPrompt Projection and Prompt Builder Scope
      STATEMENT: Projection shall omit empty Memory Context, empty S_CTX_MD, absent ActiveBrief content, and absent attachment content rather than invent replacements.
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-NO-RAW-MEMORY-LEAK
      12.2. No Default Raw Memory Leakage UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-NO-RAW-MEMORY-LEAK STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-ROOT SuperPrompt Projection and Prompt Builder Scope
      STATEMENT: Normal prompt_ready rendering shall not expose raw memory episodes, raw semantic-memory chunks, or memory debug Markdown merely because they exist in MemoryContextPack or extras.
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-STRUCTURE-SAFETY
      12.3. Raw Evidence Structural Safety UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-STRUCTURE-SAFETY STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-ROOT SuperPrompt Projection and Prompt Builder Scope
      STATEMENT: Raw retrieved document text shown in the engineered prompt shall use the current sanitization path so source headings and structural markers do not compete with the outer SuperPrompt structure.
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-NO-DURABLE-MUTATION
      12.4. No Durable Store Mutation UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-NO-DURABLE-MUTATION STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-ROOT SuperPrompt Projection and Prompt Builder Scope
      STATEMENT: SuperPrompt projection and prompt_ready composition shall not write durable document or memory stores.
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-AC-ORDER
      13.1. AC: Composition Order UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-AC-ORDER STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-ROOT SuperPrompt Projection and Prompt Builder Scope
      STATEMENT: Given a SuperPrompt containing non-empty system/configuration, current request, Memory Context, S_CTX_MD, and Attachments_MD, compose_prompt_ready shall place them in the order System/Configuration, Current User Request, Supporting Context, and Attachments.
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-AC-A4-RAW-HIDDEN
      13.2. AC: Raw Document Evidence Hidden After A4 UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-AC-A4-RAW-HIDDEN STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-ROOT SuperPrompt Projection and Prompt Builder Scope
      STATEMENT: Given stage a4 and non-empty S_CTX_MD, normal prompt_ready rendering shall show Retrieved Project Evidence Summary and shall not show raw retrieved document chunks.
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-AC-RAW-MEMORY-HIDDEN
      13.3. AC: Raw Memory Hidden UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-AC-RAW-MEMORY-HIDDEN STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-ROOT SuperPrompt Projection and Prompt Builder Scope
      STATEMENT: Given a populated MemoryContextPack and non-empty synthesized Memory Context, normal prompt_ready rendering shall show the synthesized Memory Context and shall not show raw memory candidates by default.
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-AC-RUNNER
      13.4. AC: Runner Through A4 UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-AC-RUNNER STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-ROOT SuperPrompt Projection and Prompt Builder Scope
      STATEMENT: Given valid prompt input, an active project, configured controller components, and no stage failure, the current Prompt Builder runner shall complete the six executable steps through A4, preserve stage snapshots, and leave the latest engineered prompt in SuperPrompt.prompt_ready and GUI session state.
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-AC-CURRENT-BOUNDARY
      13.5. AC: No False Completion Claim UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-AC-CURRENT-BOUNDARY STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-ROOT SuperPrompt Projection and Prompt Builder Scope
      STATEMENT: Inspection of the provided current code shall not identify a live global Hard Rule engine, completed A5 stage, dedicated operational PromptBuilder class, or completed external LLM-call/send action after prompt_ready composition.
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-ROOT
      1.1. SuperPrompt Projection and Prompt Builder Scope UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-ROOT STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
      • GHOST-CONTEXT-INTEGRATION-ROOT Context Integration and Prompt Assembly Scope
      RELATIONS (Child):
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-SOURCE-AUTHORITY Source-Code Authority
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-LEGACY-STUB Legacy PromptBuilder Stub Boundary
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-AUTHORITATIVE-STATE Authoritative Shared State
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-WRAPPER Stable Composition Wrapper
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-PROJECTOR-CONSTRUCTOR Projector Input Validation
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-DERIVED-LOGIC Derived Projection Logic Ownership
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-NO-STAGE-ALGORITHM-OWNERSHIP No Upstream Algorithm Ownership
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-QUERY-INPUTS Query Projection Inputs
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-A3-WRAPPER A3 Evaluation Wrapper
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-SYSTEM-HEADING System Section
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-CONFIG-SECTION Configuration Section
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-REQUEST-SECTION Current User Request Section
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-SUPPORT-SECTION Supporting Context Section
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-COMPOSE-SYSTEM System_MD Rebuild
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-COMPOSE-PROMPT Prompt_MD Rebuild
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-COMPOSE-ORDER prompt_ready Assembly Order
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-RUNNER-STEPS Current Executable Runner Steps
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-CURRENT-GUI-OUTPUT Current Operational Output
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-NO-SEND-IMPLEMENTATION No Completed External Send Boundary
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-A5-POSTPONED A5 Postponed Boundary
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-HARD-RULE-POSTPONED Global Hard Rule Integration Postponed
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-FUTURE-SEND-SAME-ASSEMBLY Future Send Uses Authoritative Assembly
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-FUTURE-NO-API-INVENTION No Invented Send API
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-NO-MISSING-CONTEXT-FABRICATION Missing Context Omission
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-NO-RAW-MEMORY-LEAK No Default Raw Memory Leakage
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-STRUCTURE-SAFETY Raw Evidence Structural Safety
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-NO-DURABLE-MUTATION No Durable Store Mutation
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-AC-ORDER AC: Composition Order
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-AC-A4-RAW-HIDDEN AC: Raw Document Evidence Hidden After A4
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-AC-RAW-MEMORY-HIDDEN AC: Raw Memory Hidden
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-AC-RUNNER AC: Runner Through A4
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-AC-CURRENT-BOUNDARY AC: No False Completion Claim
      STATEMENT: GHOST shall provide a projection and Prompt Builder capability that converts the current SuperPrompt state into retrieval-oriented projections, A3 comparison text, stage-visible engineered prompt previews, and the current final prompt_ready representation.

      This file shall define current implemented behavior through A4 and shall explicitly separate that behavior from the unfinished external LLM-call/send boundary, postponed A5 behavior, and future global Hard Rule integration.
    GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-SOURCE-AUTHORITY
    1.2. Source-Code Authority UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-SOURCE-AUTHORITY STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-ROOT SuperPrompt Projection and Prompt Builder Scope
    STATEMENT: The detailed behavior in this file shall follow the provided current Python source code and active runtime configuration.

    Legacy Prompt Builder descriptions shall be treated as intent only where they are not wired into the current runtime.
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-ROOT
      1.1. SuperPrompt Projection and Prompt Builder Scope UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-ROOT STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
      • GHOST-CONTEXT-INTEGRATION-ROOT Context Integration and Prompt Assembly Scope
      RELATIONS (Child):
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-SOURCE-AUTHORITY Source-Code Authority

      STATEMENT: GHOST shall provide a projection and Prompt Builder capability that converts the current SuperPrompt state into retrieval-oriented projections, A3 comparison text, stage-visible engineered prompt previews, and the current final prompt_ready representation.

      This file shall define current implemented behavior through A4 and shall explicitly separate that behavior from the unfinished external LLM-call/send boundary, postponed A5 behavior, and future global Hard Rule integration.
    GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-LEGACY-STUB
    1.3. Legacy PromptBuilder Stub Boundary UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-LEGACY-STUB STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-ROOT SuperPrompt Projection and Prompt Builder Scope
    STATEMENT: A legacy prompt_builder.py stub whose build method returns a placeholder value shall not be represented as the current operational prompt-assembly implementation.

    The current executable assembly path shall remain SuperPrompt.compose_prompt_ready() delegating to SuperPromptProjector.

    2. 2. SuperPrompt Projection State Contract
    SuperPrompt remains the authoritative run-local state object. SuperPromptProjector derives text representations from that state and writes the rendered strings back into the same object.
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-ROOT
      1.1. SuperPrompt Projection and Prompt Builder Scope UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-ROOT STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
      • GHOST-CONTEXT-INTEGRATION-ROOT Context Integration and Prompt Assembly Scope

      This file shall define current implemented behavior through A4 and shall explicitly separate that behavior from the unfinished external LLM-call/send boundary, postponed A5 behavior, and future global Hard Rule integration.
    GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-AUTHORITATIVE-STATE
    2.1. Authoritative Shared State UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-AUTHORITATIVE-STATE STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-ROOT SuperPrompt Projection and Prompt Builder Scope
    RELATIONS (Child):
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-LIFECYCLE-FIELDS Lifecycle Projection Inputs
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-BODY-FIELDS Canonical Prompt Body Fields
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-EXTRAS Runtime Extras
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-QUERY-FIELD Effective Retrieval Query Field
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-ACTIVEBRIEF-FIELDS ActiveBrief Runtime Fields
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-MEMORY-FIELDS Memory Runtime Fields
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-DOCUMENT-FIELDS Document Runtime Fields
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-RENDERED-FIELDS Rendered Prompt Fields
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-RECENT-CONVERSATION-BOUNDARY recentConversation Current Boundary
    STATEMENT: SuperPrompt shall remain the authoritative shared runtime state for the active prompt-building run.

    SuperPromptProjector shall derive projections from SuperPrompt and shall not become a parallel owner of independent prompt truth.
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-LIFECYCLE-FIELDS
      2.2. Lifecycle Projection Inputs UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-LIFECYCLE-FIELDS STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-AUTHORITATIVE-STATE Authoritative Shared State
      STATEMENT: The current SuperPrompt projection state shall include stage, model_target, and history_of_stages.

      The recognized current stage values are raw, preprocessed, a2, retrieval, reranked, a3, a4, and the reserved a5 value.
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-BODY-FIELDS
      2.3. Canonical Prompt Body Fields UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-BODY-FIELDS STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-AUTHORITATIVE-STATE Authoritative Shared State
      RELATIONS (Child):
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-BODY-DEFAULTS Current Body Defaults
      STATEMENT: The current SuperPrompt body shall support these canonical fields:

      - system;
      - task;
      - audience;
      - role;
      - tone;
      - depth;
      - confidence;
      - evidence_policy;
      - context;
      - purpose;
      - format; and
      - text.
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-EXTRAS
      2.5. Runtime Extras UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-EXTRAS STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-AUTHORITATIVE-STATE Authoritative Shared State
      STATEMENT: SuperPrompt.extras shall remain the free-form run-local location for diagnostics and namespaced stage metadata required by current projection behavior.

      Extras shall not be described as a durable store or as a general Blackboard protocol.
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-QUERY-FIELD
      2.6. Effective Retrieval Query Field UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-QUERY-FIELD STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-AUTHORITATIVE-STATE Authoritative Shared State
      STATEMENT: SuperPrompt.effective_retrieval_query_text shall hold the current effective retrieval query prepared by preprocessing/projection policy for document and memory retrieval.
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-ACTIVEBRIEF-FIELDS
      2.7. ActiveBrief Runtime Fields UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-ACTIVEBRIEF-FIELDS STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-AUTHORITATIVE-STATE Authoritative Shared State
      STATEMENT: SuperPrompt shall provide active_memory_brief_title and active_memory_brief fields for the latest memory-retrieval ActiveBrief snapshot.

      Current previous-conversation rendering shall still follow the relation-classifier snapshot stored in extras as defined by the current projector implementation.
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-MEMORY-FIELDS
      2.8. Memory Runtime Fields UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-MEMORY-FIELDS STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-AUTHORITATIVE-STATE Authoritative Shared State
      STATEMENT: SuperPrompt shall provide memory_context_text for synthesized query-relevant Memory Context and memory_context_pack for the run-local raw memory retrieval artifact.

      The raw pack shall not be treated as durable memory truth.
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-DOCUMENT-FIELDS
      2.9. Document Runtime Fields UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-DOCUMENT-FIELDS STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-AUTHORITATIVE-STATE Authoritative Shared State
      STATEMENT: SuperPrompt shall provide base_context_chunks, views_by_stage, final_selection_ids, and S_CTX_MD for document retrieval, stage ordering/status, selected identifiers, and condensed document context.
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-RENDERED-FIELDS
      2.10. Rendered Prompt Fields UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-RENDERED-FIELDS STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-AUTHORITATIVE-STATE Authoritative Shared State
      STATEMENT: SuperPrompt shall provide System_MD, Prompt_MD, S_CTX_MD, Attachments_MD, and prompt_ready as current rendered or renderable prompt artifacts.

      SuperPromptProjector shall update System_MD, Prompt_MD, and prompt_ready during composition.
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-RECENT-CONVERSATION-BOUNDARY
      2.11. recentConversation Current Boundary UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-RECENT-CONVERSATION-BOUNDARY STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-AUTHORITATIVE-STATE Authoritative Shared State
      STATEMENT: The current SuperPrompt contains a recentConversation field, but the provided current SuperPromptProjector does not render that field into prompt_ready.

      Requirements shall not claim current recentConversation rendering without additional implementation evidence.
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-AUTHORITATIVE-STATE
      2.1. Authoritative Shared State UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-AUTHORITATIVE-STATE STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-ROOT SuperPrompt Projection and Prompt Builder Scope
      RELATIONS (Child):
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-LIFECYCLE-FIELDS Lifecycle Projection Inputs
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-BODY-FIELDS Canonical Prompt Body Fields
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-EXTRAS Runtime Extras
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-QUERY-FIELD Effective Retrieval Query Field
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-ACTIVEBRIEF-FIELDS ActiveBrief Runtime Fields
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-MEMORY-FIELDS Memory Runtime Fields
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-DOCUMENT-FIELDS Document Runtime Fields
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-RENDERED-FIELDS Rendered Prompt Fields
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-RECENT-CONVERSATION-BOUNDARY recentConversation Current Boundary
      STATEMENT: SuperPrompt shall remain the authoritative shared runtime state for the active prompt-building run.

      SuperPromptProjector shall derive projections from SuperPrompt and shall not become a parallel owner of independent prompt truth.
    GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-LIFECYCLE-FIELDS

    STATEMENT: The current SuperPrompt projection state shall include stage, model_target, and history_of_stages.

    The recognized current stage values are raw, preprocessed, a2, retrieval, reranked, a3, a4, and the reserved a5 value.

    GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-BODY-FIELDS
    2.3. Canonical Prompt Body Fields UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-BODY-FIELDS STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-AUTHORITATIVE-STATE Authoritative Shared State
    RELATIONS (Child):
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-BODY-DEFAULTS Current Body Defaults
    STATEMENT: The current SuperPrompt body shall support these canonical fields:

    - system;
    - task;
    - audience;
    - role;
    - tone;
    - depth;
    - confidence;
    - evidence_policy;
    - context;
    - purpose;
    - format; and
    - text.
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-BODY-DEFAULTS
      2.4. Current Body Defaults UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-BODY-DEFAULTS STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-BODY-FIELDS Canonical Prompt Body Fields
      STATEMENT: A newly constructed SuperPrompt shall currently initialize system to consultant, tone to neutral, depth to high, and evidence_policy to normal, while the other optional canonical fields begin empty.
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-BODY-FIELDS
      2.3. Canonical Prompt Body Fields UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-BODY-FIELDS STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-AUTHORITATIVE-STATE Authoritative Shared State
      RELATIONS (Child):
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-BODY-DEFAULTS Current Body Defaults
      STATEMENT: The current SuperPrompt body shall support these canonical fields:

      - system;
      - task;
      - audience;
      - role;
      - tone;
      - depth;
      - confidence;
      - evidence_policy;
      - context;
      - purpose;
      - format; and
      - text.
    GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-BODY-DEFAULTS
    2.4. Current Body Defaults UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-BODY-DEFAULTS STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-BODY-FIELDS Canonical Prompt Body Fields
    STATEMENT: A newly constructed SuperPrompt shall currently initialize system to consultant, tone to neutral, depth to high, and evidence_policy to normal, while the other optional canonical fields begin empty.
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-AUTHORITATIVE-STATE
      2.1. Authoritative Shared State UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-AUTHORITATIVE-STATE STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):

    GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-EXTRAS
    2.5. Runtime Extras UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-EXTRAS STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-AUTHORITATIVE-STATE Authoritative Shared State
    STATEMENT: SuperPrompt.extras shall remain the free-form run-local location for diagnostics and namespaced stage metadata required by current projection behavior.

    Extras shall not be described as a durable store or as a general Blackboard protocol.
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-AUTHORITATIVE-STATE
      2.1. Authoritative Shared State UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-AUTHORITATIVE-STATE STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-ROOT SuperPrompt Projection and Prompt Builder Scope

      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-EXTRAS Runtime Extras
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-QUERY-FIELD Effective Retrieval Query Field
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-ACTIVEBRIEF-FIELDS ActiveBrief Runtime Fields
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-MEMORY-FIELDS Memory Runtime Fields
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-DOCUMENT-FIELDS Document Runtime Fields
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-RENDERED-FIELDS Rendered Prompt Fields
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-RECENT-CONVERSATION-BOUNDARY recentConversation Current Boundary
      STATEMENT: SuperPrompt shall remain the authoritative shared runtime state for the active prompt-building run.

      SuperPromptProjector shall derive projections from SuperPrompt and shall not become a parallel owner of independent prompt truth.
    GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-QUERY-FIELD
    2.6. Effective Retrieval Query Field UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-QUERY-FIELD STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-AUTHORITATIVE-STATE Authoritative Shared State
    STATEMENT: SuperPrompt.effective_retrieval_query_text shall hold the current effective retrieval query prepared by preprocessing/projection policy for document and memory retrieval.
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-AUTHORITATIVE-STATE
      2.1. Authoritative Shared State UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-AUTHORITATIVE-STATE STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-ROOT SuperPrompt Projection and Prompt Builder Scope
      RELATIONS (Child):
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-LIFECYCLE-FIELDS Lifecycle Projection Inputs
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-BODY-FIELDS Canonical Prompt Body Fields

      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-RENDERED-FIELDS Rendered Prompt Fields
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-RECENT-CONVERSATION-BOUNDARY recentConversation Current Boundary
      STATEMENT: SuperPrompt shall remain the authoritative shared runtime state for the active prompt-building run.

      SuperPromptProjector shall derive projections from SuperPrompt and shall not become a parallel owner of independent prompt truth.
    GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-ACTIVEBRIEF-FIELDS
    2.7. ActiveBrief Runtime Fields UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-ACTIVEBRIEF-FIELDS STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-AUTHORITATIVE-STATE Authoritative Shared State
    STATEMENT: SuperPrompt shall provide active_memory_brief_title and active_memory_brief fields for the latest memory-retrieval ActiveBrief snapshot.

    Current previous-conversation rendering shall still follow the relation-classifier snapshot stored in extras as defined by the current projector implementation.
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-AUTHORITATIVE-STATE
      2.1. Authoritative Shared State UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-AUTHORITATIVE-STATE STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-ROOT SuperPrompt Projection and Prompt Builder Scope
      RELATIONS (Child):
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-LIFECYCLE-FIELDS Lifecycle Projection Inputs
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-BODY-FIELDS Canonical Prompt Body Fields

      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-RENDERED-FIELDS Rendered Prompt Fields
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-RECENT-CONVERSATION-BOUNDARY recentConversation Current Boundary
      STATEMENT: SuperPrompt shall remain the authoritative shared runtime state for the active prompt-building run.

      SuperPromptProjector shall derive projections from SuperPrompt and shall not become a parallel owner of independent prompt truth.
    GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-MEMORY-FIELDS
    2.8. Memory Runtime Fields UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-MEMORY-FIELDS STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-AUTHORITATIVE-STATE Authoritative Shared State
    STATEMENT: SuperPrompt shall provide memory_context_text for synthesized query-relevant Memory Context and memory_context_pack for the run-local raw memory retrieval artifact.

    The raw pack shall not be treated as durable memory truth.
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-AUTHORITATIVE-STATE
      2.1. Authoritative Shared State UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-AUTHORITATIVE-STATE STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):

      SuperPromptProjector shall derive projections from SuperPrompt and shall not become a parallel owner of independent prompt truth.
    GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-DOCUMENT-FIELDS
    2.9. Document Runtime Fields UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-DOCUMENT-FIELDS STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-AUTHORITATIVE-STATE Authoritative Shared State
    STATEMENT: SuperPrompt shall provide base_context_chunks, views_by_stage, final_selection_ids, and S_CTX_MD for document retrieval, stage ordering/status, selected identifiers, and condensed document context.

    GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-RENDERED-FIELDS
    2.10. Rendered Prompt Fields UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-RENDERED-FIELDS STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-AUTHORITATIVE-STATE Authoritative Shared State
    STATEMENT: SuperPrompt shall provide System_MD, Prompt_MD, S_CTX_MD, Attachments_MD, and prompt_ready as current rendered or renderable prompt artifacts.

    SuperPromptProjector shall update System_MD, Prompt_MD, and prompt_ready during composition.
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-AUTHORITATIVE-STATE
      2.1. Authoritative Shared State UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-AUTHORITATIVE-STATE STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):

    GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-RECENT-CONVERSATION-BOUNDARY
    2.11. recentConversation Current Boundary UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-RECENT-CONVERSATION-BOUNDARY STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-AUTHORITATIVE-STATE Authoritative Shared State
    STATEMENT: The current SuperPrompt contains a recentConversation field, but the provided current SuperPromptProjector does not render that field into prompt_ready.

    Requirements shall not claim current recentConversation rendering without additional implementation evidence.

    3. 3. Projection Entry Points and Ownership
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-ROOT
      1.1. SuperPrompt Projection and Prompt Builder Scope UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-ROOT STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
      • GHOST-CONTEXT-INTEGRATION-ROOT Context Integration and Prompt Assembly Scope
      RELATIONS (Child):
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-SOURCE-AUTHORITY Source-Code Authority
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-LEGACY-STUB Legacy PromptBuilder Stub Boundary
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-AUTHORITATIVE-STATE Authoritative Shared State
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-WRAPPER Stable Composition Wrapper
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-PROJECTOR-CONSTRUCTOR Projector Input Validation
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-DERIVED-LOGIC Derived Projection Logic Ownership
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-NO-STAGE-ALGORITHM-OWNERSHIP No Upstream Algorithm Ownership
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-QUERY-INPUTS Query Projection Inputs
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-A3-WRAPPER A3 Evaluation Wrapper
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-SYSTEM-HEADING System Section
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-CONFIG-SECTION Configuration Section
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-REQUEST-SECTION Current User Request Section
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-SUPPORT-SECTION Supporting Context Section
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-COMPOSE-SYSTEM System_MD Rebuild
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-COMPOSE-PROMPT Prompt_MD Rebuild
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-COMPOSE-ORDER prompt_ready Assembly Order
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-RUNNER-STEPS Current Executable Runner Steps
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-CURRENT-GUI-OUTPUT Current Operational Output
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-NO-SEND-IMPLEMENTATION No Completed External Send Boundary
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-A5-POSTPONED A5 Postponed Boundary
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-HARD-RULE-POSTPONED Global Hard Rule Integration Postponed
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-FUTURE-SEND-SAME-ASSEMBLY Future Send Uses Authoritative Assembly
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-FUTURE-NO-API-INVENTION No Invented Send API
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-NO-MISSING-CONTEXT-FABRICATION Missing Context Omission
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-NO-RAW-MEMORY-LEAK No Default Raw Memory Leakage
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-STRUCTURE-SAFETY Raw Evidence Structural Safety
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-NO-DURABLE-MUTATION No Durable Store Mutation
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-AC-ORDER AC: Composition Order
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-AC-A4-RAW-HIDDEN AC: Raw Document Evidence Hidden After A4
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-AC-RAW-MEMORY-HIDDEN AC: Raw Memory Hidden
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-AC-RUNNER AC: Runner Through A4
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-AC-CURRENT-BOUNDARY AC: No False Completion Claim
      STATEMENT: GHOST shall provide a projection and Prompt Builder capability that converts the current SuperPrompt state into retrieval-oriented projections, A3 comparison text, stage-visible engineered prompt previews, and the current final prompt_ready representation.

      This file shall define current implemented behavior through A4 and shall explicitly separate that behavior from the unfinished external LLM-call/send boundary, postponed A5 behavior, and future global Hard Rule integration.
    GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-WRAPPER
    3.1. Stable Composition Wrapper UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-WRAPPER STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-ROOT SuperPrompt Projection and Prompt Builder Scope
    STATEMENT: SuperPrompt.compose_prompt_ready() shall remain the stable public wrapper for central prompt-ready rendering and shall delegate to SuperPromptProjector for the current implementation.
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-ROOT

    GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-PROJECTOR-CONSTRUCTOR
    3.2. Projector Input Validation UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-PROJECTOR-CONSTRUCTOR STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-ROOT SuperPrompt Projection and Prompt Builder Scope
    STATEMENT: SuperPromptProjector construction shall reject a missing SuperPrompt reference rather than creating an unbound projector.

    GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-DERIVED-LOGIC
    3.3. Derived Projection Logic Ownership UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-DERIVED-LOGIC STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-ROOT SuperPrompt Projection and Prompt Builder Scope
    STATEMENT: SuperPromptProjector shall own derived text projections from current SuperPrompt state, including retrieval query text, A3 comparison prompt text, system/configuration Markdown, current-request Markdown, supporting-context Markdown, and prompt_ready assembly.

    GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-NO-STAGE-ALGORITHM-OWNERSHIP
    3.4. No Upstream Algorithm Ownership UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-NO-STAGE-ALGORITHM-OWNERSHIP STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-ROOT SuperPrompt Projection and Prompt Builder Scope
    STATEMENT: SuperPromptProjector shall not own A2 selection, document retrieval, reranking, A3 usefulness classification, A4 condensation, memory candidate scoring, memory compression, or Memory Context synthesis.

    4. 4. Retrieval Query Projection
    The projector currently derives retrieval query text from TASK, PURPOSE, CONTEXT, prompt materiality, topic relation, and the ActiveBrief snapshot prepared by the prompt-relation classifier.

    30_preprocessing_prompt_functions.sdoc owns the routing semantics. This section records the current projection implementation used by downstream retrieval.
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-ROOT
      1.1. SuperPrompt Projection and Prompt Builder Scope UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-ROOT STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
      • GHOST-CONTEXT-INTEGRATION-ROOT Context Integration and Prompt Assembly Scope
      RELATIONS (Child):
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-SOURCE-AUTHORITY Source-Code Authority
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-LEGACY-STUB Legacy PromptBuilder Stub Boundary

      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-WRAPPER Stable Composition Wrapper
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-PROJECTOR-CONSTRUCTOR Projector Input Validation
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-DERIVED-LOGIC Derived Projection Logic Ownership
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-NO-STAGE-ALGORITHM-OWNERSHIP No Upstream Algorithm Ownership
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-QUERY-INPUTS Query Projection Inputs
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-A3-WRAPPER A3 Evaluation Wrapper
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-SYSTEM-HEADING System Section
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-CONFIG-SECTION Configuration Section
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-REQUEST-SECTION Current User Request Section
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-SUPPORT-SECTION Supporting Context Section
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-COMPOSE-SYSTEM System_MD Rebuild
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-COMPOSE-PROMPT Prompt_MD Rebuild
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-COMPOSE-ORDER prompt_ready Assembly Order

      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-CURRENT-GUI-OUTPUT Current Operational Output
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-NO-SEND-IMPLEMENTATION No Completed External Send Boundary
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-A5-POSTPONED A5 Postponed Boundary
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-HARD-RULE-POSTPONED Global Hard Rule Integration Postponed
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-FUTURE-SEND-SAME-ASSEMBLY Future Send Uses Authoritative Assembly
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-FUTURE-NO-API-INVENTION No Invented Send API
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-NO-MISSING-CONTEXT-FABRICATION Missing Context Omission
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-NO-RAW-MEMORY-LEAK No Default Raw Memory Leakage
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-STRUCTURE-SAFETY Raw Evidence Structural Safety
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-NO-DURABLE-MUTATION No Durable Store Mutation
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-AC-ORDER AC: Composition Order
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-AC-A4-RAW-HIDDEN AC: Raw Document Evidence Hidden After A4
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-AC-RAW-MEMORY-HIDDEN AC: Raw Memory Hidden
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-AC-RUNNER AC: Runner Through A4
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-AC-CURRENT-BOUNDARY AC: No False Completion Claim
      STATEMENT: GHOST shall provide a projection and Prompt Builder capability that converts the current SuperPrompt state into retrieval-oriented projections, A3 comparison text, stage-visible engineered prompt previews, and the current final prompt_ready representation.

      This file shall define current implemented behavior through A4 and shall explicitly separate that behavior from the unfinished external LLM-call/send boundary, postponed A5 behavior, and future global Hard Rule integration.
    GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-QUERY-INPUTS
    4.1. Query Projection Inputs UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-QUERY-INPUTS STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-ROOT SuperPrompt Projection and Prompt Builder Scope
    RELATIONS (Child):
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-QUERY-STRONG Strong Prompt Query Projection
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-QUERY-WEAK-SAME Weak Same-Topic Query Projection
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-QUERY-WEAK-RELATED Weak Related-Domain Query Projection
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-QUERY-WEAK-IRRELEVANT Weak Irrelevant Query Suppression
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-QUERY-BLOCK-ORDER Query Block Order
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-QUERY-EMPTY-ERROR Unexpected Empty Query Error
    STATEMENT: Retrieval query projection shall read task, purpose, and context from SuperPrompt.body and shall read activebrief_prompt_materiality, activebrief_topic_relation, and activebrief_relation_activebrief from SuperPrompt.extras.
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-QUERY-STRONG
      4.2. Strong Prompt Query Projection UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-QUERY-STRONG STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-QUERY-INPUTS Query Projection Inputs
      STATEMENT: For STRONG prompts with SAME_TOPIC, RELATED_DOMAIN, or IRRELEVANT topic relation, the current retrieval query projection shall use current TASK, PURPOSE, and CONTEXT without adding ActiveBrief content.
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-QUERY-WEAK-SAME
      4.3. Weak Same-Topic Query Projection UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-QUERY-WEAK-SAME STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-QUERY-INPUTS Query Projection Inputs
      STATEMENT: For a WEAK SAME_TOPIC prompt, the current retrieval query projection shall add the full ActiveBrief body as a previous memory summary after the current TASK, PURPOSE, and CONTEXT blocks.
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-QUERY-WEAK-RELATED
      4.4. Weak Related-Domain Query Projection UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-QUERY-WEAK-RELATED STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-QUERY-INPUTS Query Projection Inputs
      STATEMENT: For a WEAK RELATED_DOMAIN prompt, the current retrieval query projection shall add only the ActiveBrief title after the current TASK, PURPOSE, and CONTEXT blocks.
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-QUERY-WEAK-IRRELEVANT
      4.5. Weak Irrelevant Query Suppression UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-QUERY-WEAK-IRRELEVANT STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-QUERY-INPUTS Query Projection Inputs
      STATEMENT: For a WEAK IRRELEVANT prompt, the current retrieval query projection shall return an empty query so document retrieval can be suppressed by the upstream routing contract.
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-QUERY-BLOCK-ORDER
      4.6. Query Block Order UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-QUERY-BLOCK-ORDER STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-QUERY-INPUTS Query Projection Inputs
      STATEMENT: When present, retrieval query blocks shall be emitted in this order:

      1. TASK;
      2. PURPOSE;
      3. CONTEXT; and
      4. permitted previous-memory title or summary.
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-QUERY-EMPTY-ERROR
      4.7. Unexpected Empty Query Error UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-QUERY-EMPTY-ERROR STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-QUERY-INPUTS Query Projection Inputs
      STATEMENT: Outside the explicit WEAK IRRELEVANT suppression route, query projection shall raise an error when TASK, PURPOSE, and CONTEXT produce no query text.
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-QUERY-INPUTS
      4.1. Query Projection Inputs UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-QUERY-INPUTS STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-ROOT SuperPrompt Projection and Prompt Builder Scope
      RELATIONS (Child):
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-QUERY-STRONG Strong Prompt Query Projection
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-QUERY-WEAK-SAME Weak Same-Topic Query Projection
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-QUERY-WEAK-RELATED Weak Related-Domain Query Projection
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-QUERY-WEAK-IRRELEVANT Weak Irrelevant Query Suppression
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-QUERY-BLOCK-ORDER Query Block Order
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-QUERY-EMPTY-ERROR Unexpected Empty Query Error
      STATEMENT: Retrieval query projection shall read task, purpose, and context from SuperPrompt.body and shall read activebrief_prompt_materiality, activebrief_topic_relation, and activebrief_relation_activebrief from SuperPrompt.extras.
    GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-QUERY-STRONG

    STATEMENT: For STRONG prompts with SAME_TOPIC, RELATED_DOMAIN, or IRRELEVANT topic relation, the current retrieval query projection shall use current TASK, PURPOSE, and CONTEXT without adding ActiveBrief content.

    STATEMENT: For a WEAK SAME_TOPIC prompt, the current retrieval query projection shall add the full ActiveBrief body as a previous memory summary after the current TASK, PURPOSE, and CONTEXT blocks.

    STATEMENT: For a WEAK RELATED_DOMAIN prompt, the current retrieval query projection shall add only the ActiveBrief title after the current TASK, PURPOSE, and CONTEXT blocks.

    4.7. Unexpected Empty Query Error UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-QUERY-EMPTY-ERROR STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):

    5. 5. A3 Comparison Prompt Projection
    The current projector also prepares the request-under-evaluation used by A3. The evidence-selection semantics remain owned by 43_evidence_selection_and_condensation.sdoc.
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-ROOT
      1.1. SuperPrompt Projection and Prompt Builder Scope UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-ROOT STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
      • GHOST-CONTEXT-INTEGRATION-ROOT Context Integration and Prompt Assembly Scope
      RELATIONS (Child):
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-SOURCE-AUTHORITY Source-Code Authority
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-LEGACY-STUB Legacy PromptBuilder Stub Boundary
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-AUTHORITATIVE-STATE Authoritative Shared State
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-WRAPPER Stable Composition Wrapper
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-PROJECTOR-CONSTRUCTOR Projector Input Validation
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-DERIVED-LOGIC Derived Projection Logic Ownership
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-NO-STAGE-ALGORITHM-OWNERSHIP No Upstream Algorithm Ownership
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-QUERY-INPUTS Query Projection Inputs
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-A3-WRAPPER A3 Evaluation Wrapper
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-SYSTEM-HEADING System Section
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-CONFIG-SECTION Configuration Section
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-REQUEST-SECTION Current User Request Section
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-SUPPORT-SECTION Supporting Context Section
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-COMPOSE-SYSTEM System_MD Rebuild
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-COMPOSE-PROMPT Prompt_MD Rebuild
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-COMPOSE-ORDER prompt_ready Assembly Order
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-RUNNER-STEPS Current Executable Runner Steps
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-CURRENT-GUI-OUTPUT Current Operational Output
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-NO-SEND-IMPLEMENTATION No Completed External Send Boundary
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-A5-POSTPONED A5 Postponed Boundary
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-HARD-RULE-POSTPONED Global Hard Rule Integration Postponed
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-FUTURE-SEND-SAME-ASSEMBLY Future Send Uses Authoritative Assembly
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-FUTURE-NO-API-INVENTION No Invented Send API
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-NO-MISSING-CONTEXT-FABRICATION Missing Context Omission
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-NO-RAW-MEMORY-LEAK No Default Raw Memory Leakage
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-STRUCTURE-SAFETY Raw Evidence Structural Safety
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-NO-DURABLE-MUTATION No Durable Store Mutation
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-AC-ORDER AC: Composition Order
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-AC-A4-RAW-HIDDEN AC: Raw Document Evidence Hidden After A4
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-AC-RAW-MEMORY-HIDDEN AC: Raw Memory Hidden
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-AC-RUNNER AC: Runner Through A4
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-AC-CURRENT-BOUNDARY AC: No False Completion Claim
      STATEMENT: GHOST shall provide a projection and Prompt Builder capability that converts the current SuperPrompt state into retrieval-oriented projections, A3 comparison text, stage-visible engineered prompt previews, and the current final prompt_ready representation.

      This file shall define current implemented behavior through A4 and shall explicitly separate that behavior from the unfinished external LLM-call/send boundary, postponed A5 behavior, and future global Hard Rule integration.
    GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-A3-WRAPPER
    5.1. A3 Evaluation Wrapper UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-A3-WRAPPER STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-ROOT SuperPrompt Projection and Prompt Builder Scope
    RELATIONS (Child):
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-A3-FULL-BRIEF A3 Full ActiveBrief Routes
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-A3-TITLE-ONLY A3 ActiveBrief Title-Only Routes
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-A3-NO-CONTEXT-FABRICATION A3 Missing ActiveBrief Handling
    STATEMENT: The A3 comparison projection shall wrap the current request and any permitted ActiveBrief continuity material inside one user_prompt_under_evaluation structure.
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-A3-FULL-BRIEF
      5.2. A3 Full ActiveBrief Routes UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-A3-FULL-BRIEF STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-A3-WRAPPER A3 Evaluation Wrapper
      STATEMENT: The current A3 comparison projection shall include the full ActiveBrief body for:

      - STRONG SAME_TOPIC;
      - STRONG RELATED_DOMAIN;
      - WEAK SAME_TOPIC; and
      - WEAK IRRELEVANT.
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-A3-TITLE-ONLY
      5.3. A3 ActiveBrief Title-Only Routes UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-A3-TITLE-ONLY STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-A3-WRAPPER A3 Evaluation Wrapper
      STATEMENT: The current A3 comparison projection shall include only the ActiveBrief title for:

      - STRONG IRRELEVANT; and
      - WEAK RELATED_DOMAIN.
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-A3-NO-CONTEXT-FABRICATION
      5.4. A3 Missing ActiveBrief Handling UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-A3-NO-CONTEXT-FABRICATION STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-A3-WRAPPER A3 Evaluation Wrapper
      STATEMENT: When the selected A3 projection route permits ActiveBrief content but the corresponding title or body is empty, the projector shall omit that block rather than fabricate continuity text.
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-A3-WRAPPER
      5.1. A3 Evaluation Wrapper UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-A3-WRAPPER STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-ROOT SuperPrompt Projection and Prompt Builder Scope
      RELATIONS (Child):
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-A3-FULL-BRIEF A3 Full ActiveBrief Routes
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-A3-TITLE-ONLY A3 ActiveBrief Title-Only Routes
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-A3-NO-CONTEXT-FABRICATION A3 Missing ActiveBrief Handling
      STATEMENT: The A3 comparison projection shall wrap the current request and any permitted ActiveBrief continuity material inside one user_prompt_under_evaluation structure.
    GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-A3-FULL-BRIEF
    5.2. A3 Full ActiveBrief Routes UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-A3-FULL-BRIEF STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-A3-WRAPPER A3 Evaluation Wrapper
    STATEMENT: The current A3 comparison projection shall include the full ActiveBrief body for:

    - STRONG SAME_TOPIC;
    - STRONG RELATED_DOMAIN;
    - WEAK SAME_TOPIC; and
    - WEAK IRRELEVANT.
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-A3-WRAPPER
      5.1. A3 Evaluation Wrapper UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-A3-WRAPPER STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-ROOT SuperPrompt Projection and Prompt Builder Scope
      RELATIONS (Child):
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-A3-FULL-BRIEF A3 Full ActiveBrief Routes
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-A3-TITLE-ONLY A3 ActiveBrief Title-Only Routes
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-A3-NO-CONTEXT-FABRICATION A3 Missing ActiveBrief Handling
      STATEMENT: The A3 comparison projection shall wrap the current request and any permitted ActiveBrief continuity material inside one user_prompt_under_evaluation structure.
    GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-A3-TITLE-ONLY
    5.3. A3 ActiveBrief Title-Only Routes UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-A3-TITLE-ONLY STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-A3-WRAPPER A3 Evaluation Wrapper
    STATEMENT: The current A3 comparison projection shall include only the ActiveBrief title for:

    - STRONG IRRELEVANT; and
    - WEAK RELATED_DOMAIN.
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-A3-WRAPPER
      5.1. A3 Evaluation Wrapper UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-A3-WRAPPER STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-ROOT SuperPrompt Projection and Prompt Builder Scope
      RELATIONS (Child):
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-A3-FULL-BRIEF A3 Full ActiveBrief Routes
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-A3-TITLE-ONLY A3 ActiveBrief Title-Only Routes
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-A3-NO-CONTEXT-FABRICATION A3 Missing ActiveBrief Handling
      STATEMENT: The A3 comparison projection shall wrap the current request and any permitted ActiveBrief continuity material inside one user_prompt_under_evaluation structure.
    GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-A3-NO-CONTEXT-FABRICATION
    5.4. A3 Missing ActiveBrief Handling UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-A3-NO-CONTEXT-FABRICATION STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-A3-WRAPPER A3 Evaluation Wrapper
    STATEMENT: When the selected A3 projection route permits ActiveBrief content but the corresponding title or body is empty, the projector shall omit that block rather than fabricate continuity text.

    6. 6. System and Configuration Rendering
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-ROOT
      1.1. SuperPrompt Projection and Prompt Builder Scope UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-ROOT STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
      • GHOST-CONTEXT-INTEGRATION-ROOT Context Integration and Prompt Assembly Scope
      RELATIONS (Child):
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-SOURCE-AUTHORITY Source-Code Authority
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-LEGACY-STUB Legacy PromptBuilder Stub Boundary
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-AUTHORITATIVE-STATE Authoritative Shared State
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-WRAPPER Stable Composition Wrapper
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-PROJECTOR-CONSTRUCTOR Projector Input Validation
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-DERIVED-LOGIC Derived Projection Logic Ownership
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-NO-STAGE-ALGORITHM-OWNERSHIP No Upstream Algorithm Ownership
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-QUERY-INPUTS Query Projection Inputs

      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-CONFIG-SECTION Configuration Section
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-REQUEST-SECTION Current User Request Section

      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-COMPOSE-PROMPT Prompt_MD Rebuild
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-COMPOSE-ORDER prompt_ready Assembly Order
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-RUNNER-STEPS Current Executable Runner Steps
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-CURRENT-GUI-OUTPUT Current Operational Output
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-NO-SEND-IMPLEMENTATION No Completed External Send Boundary
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-A5-POSTPONED A5 Postponed Boundary
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-HARD-RULE-POSTPONED Global Hard Rule Integration Postponed
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-FUTURE-SEND-SAME-ASSEMBLY Future Send Uses Authoritative Assembly
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-FUTURE-NO-API-INVENTION No Invented Send API
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-NO-MISSING-CONTEXT-FABRICATION Missing Context Omission
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-NO-RAW-MEMORY-LEAK No Default Raw Memory Leakage
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-STRUCTURE-SAFETY Raw Evidence Structural Safety
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-NO-DURABLE-MUTATION No Durable Store Mutation
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-AC-ORDER AC: Composition Order

      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-AC-RAW-MEMORY-HIDDEN AC: Raw Memory Hidden
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-AC-RUNNER AC: Runner Through A4
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-AC-CURRENT-BOUNDARY AC: No False Completion Claim
      STATEMENT: GHOST shall provide a projection and Prompt Builder capability that converts the current SuperPrompt state into retrieval-oriented projections, A3 comparison text, stage-visible engineered prompt previews, and the current final prompt_ready representation.

      This file shall define current implemented behavior through A4 and shall explicitly separate that behavior from the unfinished external LLM-call/send boundary, postponed A5 behavior, and future global Hard Rule integration.
    GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-SYSTEM-HEADING
    6.1. System Section UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-SYSTEM-HEADING STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-ROOT SuperPrompt Projection and Prompt Builder Scope
    STATEMENT: System rendering shall emit a top-level System section and shall place the current body.system value directly below it when present.
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-ROOT
      1.1. SuperPrompt Projection and Prompt Builder Scope UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-ROOT STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
      • GHOST-CONTEXT-INTEGRATION-ROOT Context Integration and Prompt Assembly Scope
      RELATIONS (Child):
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-SOURCE-AUTHORITY Source-Code Authority
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-LEGACY-STUB Legacy PromptBuilder Stub Boundary
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-AUTHORITATIVE-STATE Authoritative Shared State
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-WRAPPER Stable Composition Wrapper
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-PROJECTOR-CONSTRUCTOR Projector Input Validation
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-DERIVED-LOGIC Derived Projection Logic Ownership
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-NO-STAGE-ALGORITHM-OWNERSHIP No Upstream Algorithm Ownership
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-QUERY-INPUTS Query Projection Inputs
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-A3-WRAPPER A3 Evaluation Wrapper
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-SYSTEM-HEADING System Section
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-CONFIG-SECTION Configuration Section
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-REQUEST-SECTION Current User Request Section
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-SUPPORT-SECTION Supporting Context Section
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-COMPOSE-SYSTEM System_MD Rebuild
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-COMPOSE-PROMPT Prompt_MD Rebuild
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-COMPOSE-ORDER prompt_ready Assembly Order
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-RUNNER-STEPS Current Executable Runner Steps
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-CURRENT-GUI-OUTPUT Current Operational Output
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-NO-SEND-IMPLEMENTATION No Completed External Send Boundary
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-A5-POSTPONED A5 Postponed Boundary
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-HARD-RULE-POSTPONED Global Hard Rule Integration Postponed
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-FUTURE-SEND-SAME-ASSEMBLY Future Send Uses Authoritative Assembly
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-FUTURE-NO-API-INVENTION No Invented Send API
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-NO-MISSING-CONTEXT-FABRICATION Missing Context Omission
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-NO-RAW-MEMORY-LEAK No Default Raw Memory Leakage
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-STRUCTURE-SAFETY Raw Evidence Structural Safety
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-NO-DURABLE-MUTATION No Durable Store Mutation
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-AC-ORDER AC: Composition Order
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-AC-A4-RAW-HIDDEN AC: Raw Document Evidence Hidden After A4
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-AC-RAW-MEMORY-HIDDEN AC: Raw Memory Hidden
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-AC-RUNNER AC: Runner Through A4
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-AC-CURRENT-BOUNDARY AC: No False Completion Claim
      STATEMENT: GHOST shall provide a projection and Prompt Builder capability that converts the current SuperPrompt state into retrieval-oriented projections, A3 comparison text, stage-visible engineered prompt previews, and the current final prompt_ready representation.

      This file shall define current implemented behavior through A4 and shall explicitly separate that behavior from the unfinished external LLM-call/send boundary, postponed A5 behavior, and future global Hard Rule integration.
    GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-CONFIG-SECTION
    6.2. Configuration Section UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-CONFIG-SECTION STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-ROOT SuperPrompt Projection and Prompt Builder Scope
    RELATIONS (Child):
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-EVIDENCE-POLICY-PRECEDENCE Evidence Policy Identifier Precedence
    STATEMENT: System rendering shall emit a Configuration section after the System section.

    When corresponding values are present, configuration lines shall be emitted in this order:

    1. Role;
    2. Audience;
    3. Tone;
    4. Depth;
    5. Confidence; and
    6. Evidence Policy identifier when the policy produces a rendered policy block.
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-EVIDENCE-POLICY-PRECEDENCE
      6.3. Evidence Policy Identifier Precedence UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-EVIDENCE-POLICY-PRECEDENCE STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-CONFIG-SECTION Configuration Section
      RELATIONS (Child):
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-EVIDENCE-POLICY-NORMAL Normal Evidence Policy Rendering
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-EVIDENCE-POLICY-LOCAL-CONTEXT Current local_context_first Policy Rendering
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-EVIDENCE-POLICY-STRICT strict_history_and_online_fact_check Rendering
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-EVIDENCE-POLICY-UNKNOWN Unknown Evidence Policy Rendering
      STATEMENT: The current renderer shall resolve the evidence-policy identifier in this order:

      1. extras.a2_selected_ids.evidence_policy;
      2. body.evidence_policy; and
      3. normal as fallback.
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-CONFIG-SECTION
      6.2. Configuration Section UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-CONFIG-SECTION STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-ROOT SuperPrompt Projection and Prompt Builder Scope
      RELATIONS (Child):
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-EVIDENCE-POLICY-PRECEDENCE Evidence Policy Identifier Precedence
      STATEMENT: System rendering shall emit a Configuration section after the System section.

      When corresponding values are present, configuration lines shall be emitted in this order:

      1. Role;
      2. Audience;
      3. Tone;
      4. Depth;
      5. Confidence; and
      6. Evidence Policy identifier when the policy produces a rendered policy block.
    GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-EVIDENCE-POLICY-PRECEDENCE
    6.3. Evidence Policy Identifier Precedence UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-EVIDENCE-POLICY-PRECEDENCE STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-CONFIG-SECTION Configuration Section
    RELATIONS (Child):
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-EVIDENCE-POLICY-NORMAL Normal Evidence Policy Rendering
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-EVIDENCE-POLICY-LOCAL-CONTEXT Current local_context_first Policy Rendering
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-EVIDENCE-POLICY-STRICT strict_history_and_online_fact_check Rendering
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-EVIDENCE-POLICY-UNKNOWN Unknown Evidence Policy Rendering
    STATEMENT: The current renderer shall resolve the evidence-policy identifier in this order:

    1. extras.a2_selected_ids.evidence_policy;
    2. body.evidence_policy; and
    3. normal as fallback.
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-EVIDENCE-POLICY-NORMAL
      6.4. Normal Evidence Policy Rendering UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-EVIDENCE-POLICY-NORMAL STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-EVIDENCE-POLICY-PRECEDENCE Evidence Policy Identifier Precedence
      STATEMENT: When the resolved evidence-policy identifier is empty or normal, the current renderer shall not add a separate Evidence Policy instruction block.
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-EVIDENCE-POLICY-LOCAL-CONTEXT
      6.5. Current local_context_first Policy Rendering UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-EVIDENCE-POLICY-LOCAL-CONTEXT STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-EVIDENCE-POLICY-PRECEDENCE Evidence Policy Identifier Precedence
      STATEMENT: When the current code identifier local_context_first is selected, the renderer shall add the configured local/project/history-first evidence instructions defined in SuperPromptProjector.

      This identifier describes one current policy option and shall not be used to redefine GHOST as a local-first product.
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-EVIDENCE-POLICY-STRICT
      6.6. strict_history_and_online_fact_check Rendering UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-EVIDENCE-POLICY-STRICT STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-EVIDENCE-POLICY-PRECEDENCE Evidence Policy Identifier Precedence
      STATEMENT: When strict_history_and_online_fact_check is selected, the renderer shall add the current configured instructions to prioritize available prompt/history/memory/project evidence, verify external unstable facts online when possible, cite evidence when possible, and identify missing evidence instead of inventing it.
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-EVIDENCE-POLICY-UNKNOWN
      6.7. Unknown Evidence Policy Rendering UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-EVIDENCE-POLICY-UNKNOWN STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-EVIDENCE-POLICY-PRECEDENCE Evidence Policy Identifier Precedence
      STATEMENT: A resolved evidence-policy identifier not explicitly recognized by the current projector shall not create an invented policy instruction block.
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-EVIDENCE-POLICY-PRECEDENCE
      6.3. Evidence Policy Identifier Precedence UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-EVIDENCE-POLICY-PRECEDENCE STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-CONFIG-SECTION Configuration Section
      RELATIONS (Child):
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-EVIDENCE-POLICY-NORMAL Normal Evidence Policy Rendering
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-EVIDENCE-POLICY-LOCAL-CONTEXT Current local_context_first Policy Rendering
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-EVIDENCE-POLICY-STRICT strict_history_and_online_fact_check Rendering
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-EVIDENCE-POLICY-UNKNOWN Unknown Evidence Policy Rendering
      STATEMENT: The current renderer shall resolve the evidence-policy identifier in this order:

      1. extras.a2_selected_ids.evidence_policy;
      2. body.evidence_policy; and
      3. normal as fallback.
    GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-EVIDENCE-POLICY-NORMAL
