    STATEMENT: When the resolved evidence-policy identifier is empty or normal, the current renderer shall not add a separate Evidence Policy instruction block.

    STATEMENT: When strict_history_and_online_fact_check is selected, the renderer shall add the current configured instructions to prioritize available prompt/history/memory/project evidence, verify external unstable facts online when possible, cite evidence when possible, and identify missing evidence instead of inventing it.

    7. 7. Current User Request Rendering
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-ROOT
      1.1. SuperPrompt Projection and Prompt Builder Scope UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-ROOT STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
      • GHOST-CONTEXT-INTEGRATION-ROOT Context Integration and Prompt Assembly Scope
      RELATIONS (Child):
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-SOURCE-AUTHORITY Source-Code Authority
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-LEGACY-STUB Legacy PromptBuilder Stub Boundary
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-AUTHORITATIVE-STATE Authoritative Shared State
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-WRAPPER Stable Composition Wrapper
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-PROJECTOR-CONSTRUCTOR Projector Input Validation
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-DERIVED-LOGIC Derived Projection Logic Ownership
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-NO-STAGE-ALGORITHM-OWNERSHIP No Upstream Algorithm Ownership
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-QUERY-INPUTS Query Projection Inputs
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-A3-WRAPPER A3 Evaluation Wrapper
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-SYSTEM-HEADING System Section
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-CONFIG-SECTION Configuration Section
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-REQUEST-SECTION Current User Request Section
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-SUPPORT-SECTION Supporting Context Section
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-COMPOSE-SYSTEM System_MD Rebuild
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-COMPOSE-PROMPT Prompt_MD Rebuild
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-COMPOSE-ORDER prompt_ready Assembly Order
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-RUNNER-STEPS Current Executable Runner Steps
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-CURRENT-GUI-OUTPUT Current Operational Output
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-NO-SEND-IMPLEMENTATION No Completed External Send Boundary
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-A5-POSTPONED A5 Postponed Boundary
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-HARD-RULE-POSTPONED Global Hard Rule Integration Postponed
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-FUTURE-SEND-SAME-ASSEMBLY Future Send Uses Authoritative Assembly
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-FUTURE-NO-API-INVENTION No Invented Send API
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-NO-MISSING-CONTEXT-FABRICATION Missing Context Omission
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-NO-RAW-MEMORY-LEAK No Default Raw Memory Leakage
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-STRUCTURE-SAFETY Raw Evidence Structural Safety
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-NO-DURABLE-MUTATION No Durable Store Mutation
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-AC-ORDER AC: Composition Order
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-AC-A4-RAW-HIDDEN AC: Raw Document Evidence Hidden After A4
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-AC-RAW-MEMORY-HIDDEN AC: Raw Memory Hidden
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-AC-RUNNER AC: Runner Through A4
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-AC-CURRENT-BOUNDARY AC: No False Completion Claim
      STATEMENT: GHOST shall provide a projection and Prompt Builder capability that converts the current SuperPrompt state into retrieval-oriented projections, A3 comparison text, stage-visible engineered prompt previews, and the current final prompt_ready representation.

      This file shall define current implemented behavior through A4 and shall explicitly separate that behavior from the unfinished external LLM-call/send boundary, postponed A5 behavior, and future global Hard Rule integration.
    GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-REQUEST-SECTION
    7.1. Current User Request Section UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-REQUEST-SECTION STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-ROOT SuperPrompt Projection and Prompt Builder Scope
    RELATIONS (Child):
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-REQUEST-PRIORITY Current Request Priority Instruction
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-REQUEST-TASK Task Block
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-REQUEST-OPTIONALS Optional Request Blocks
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-REQUEST-NO-A2-IN-TASK Configuration Separation from Task
    STATEMENT: Prompt rendering shall emit a top-level Current User Request section after System and Configuration.
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-REQUEST-PRIORITY
      7.2. Current Request Priority Instruction UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-REQUEST-PRIORITY STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-REQUEST-SECTION Current User Request Section
      STATEMENT: The Current User Request section shall state that the current request has highest priority and that later memory and retrieved context are supporting background only.
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-REQUEST-TASK
      7.3. Task Block UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-REQUEST-TASK STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-REQUEST-SECTION Current User Request Section
      STATEMENT: The renderer shall emit a Task subsection and shall write the current body.task value into it.
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-REQUEST-OPTIONALS
      7.4. Optional Request Blocks UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-REQUEST-OPTIONALS STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-REQUEST-SECTION Current User Request Section
      STATEMENT: After Task, the renderer shall emit non-empty optional request subsections in this order:

      1. Purpose;
      2. Context;
      3. Format; and
      4. Text.
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-REQUEST-NO-A2-IN-TASK
      7.5. Configuration Separation from Task UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-REQUEST-NO-A2-IN-TASK STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-REQUEST-SECTION Current User Request Section
      STATEMENT: A2-selected role, audience, tone, depth, confidence, and evidence policy shall remain in System/Configuration rendering and shall not be merged into the Task text as if they were part of the user's request.
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-REQUEST-SECTION
      7.1. Current User Request Section UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-REQUEST-SECTION STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-ROOT SuperPrompt Projection and Prompt Builder Scope
      RELATIONS (Child):
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-REQUEST-PRIORITY Current Request Priority Instruction
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-REQUEST-TASK Task Block
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-REQUEST-OPTIONALS Optional Request Blocks
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-REQUEST-NO-A2-IN-TASK Configuration Separation from Task
      STATEMENT: Prompt rendering shall emit a top-level Current User Request section after System and Configuration.
    GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-REQUEST-PRIORITY
    7.2. Current Request Priority Instruction UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-REQUEST-PRIORITY STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-REQUEST-SECTION Current User Request Section
    STATEMENT: The Current User Request section shall state that the current request has highest priority and that later memory and retrieved context are supporting background only.
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-REQUEST-SECTION

    7.3. Task Block UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-REQUEST-TASK STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-REQUEST-SECTION Current User Request Section
    STATEMENT: The renderer shall emit a Task subsection and shall write the current body.task value into it.
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-REQUEST-SECTION
      7.1. Current User Request Section UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-REQUEST-SECTION STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-ROOT SuperPrompt Projection and Prompt Builder Scope

    GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-REQUEST-OPTIONALS
    7.4. Optional Request Blocks UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-REQUEST-OPTIONALS STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-REQUEST-SECTION Current User Request Section
    STATEMENT: After Task, the renderer shall emit non-empty optional request subsections in this order:

    1. Purpose;
    2. Context;
    3. Format; and
    4. Text.
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-REQUEST-SECTION
      7.1. Current User Request Section UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-REQUEST-SECTION STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-ROOT SuperPrompt Projection and Prompt Builder Scope
      RELATIONS (Child):
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-REQUEST-PRIORITY Current Request Priority Instruction
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-REQUEST-TASK Task Block
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-REQUEST-OPTIONALS Optional Request Blocks

    GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-REQUEST-NO-A2-IN-TASK
    7.5. Configuration Separation from Task UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-REQUEST-NO-A2-IN-TASK STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-REQUEST-SECTION Current User Request Section
    STATEMENT: A2-selected role, audience, tone, depth, confidence, and evidence policy shall remain in System/Configuration rendering and shall not be merged into the Task text as if they were part of the user's request.

    8. 8. Supporting Context Rendering
    Supporting context is rendered only when at least one permitted previous-summary/topic block, synthesized Memory Context, document summary, or stage-visible raw document evidence is available.
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-ROOT
      1.1. SuperPrompt Projection and Prompt Builder Scope UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-ROOT STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
      • GHOST-CONTEXT-INTEGRATION-ROOT Context Integration and Prompt Assembly Scope
      RELATIONS (Child):
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-SOURCE-AUTHORITY Source-Code Authority
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-LEGACY-STUB Legacy PromptBuilder Stub Boundary
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-AUTHORITATIVE-STATE Authoritative Shared State
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-WRAPPER Stable Composition Wrapper
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-PROJECTOR-CONSTRUCTOR Projector Input Validation
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-DERIVED-LOGIC Derived Projection Logic Ownership
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-NO-STAGE-ALGORITHM-OWNERSHIP No Upstream Algorithm Ownership
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-QUERY-INPUTS Query Projection Inputs
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-A3-WRAPPER A3 Evaluation Wrapper
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-SYSTEM-HEADING System Section
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-CONFIG-SECTION Configuration Section
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-REQUEST-SECTION Current User Request Section
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-SUPPORT-SECTION Supporting Context Section
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-COMPOSE-SYSTEM System_MD Rebuild
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-COMPOSE-PROMPT Prompt_MD Rebuild
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-COMPOSE-ORDER prompt_ready Assembly Order
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-RUNNER-STEPS Current Executable Runner Steps
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-CURRENT-GUI-OUTPUT Current Operational Output
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-NO-SEND-IMPLEMENTATION No Completed External Send Boundary
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-A5-POSTPONED A5 Postponed Boundary
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-HARD-RULE-POSTPONED Global Hard Rule Integration Postponed
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-FUTURE-SEND-SAME-ASSEMBLY Future Send Uses Authoritative Assembly
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-FUTURE-NO-API-INVENTION No Invented Send API
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-NO-MISSING-CONTEXT-FABRICATION Missing Context Omission
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-NO-RAW-MEMORY-LEAK No Default Raw Memory Leakage
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-STRUCTURE-SAFETY Raw Evidence Structural Safety
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-NO-DURABLE-MUTATION No Durable Store Mutation
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-AC-ORDER AC: Composition Order
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-AC-A4-RAW-HIDDEN AC: Raw Document Evidence Hidden After A4
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-AC-RAW-MEMORY-HIDDEN AC: Raw Memory Hidden
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-AC-RUNNER AC: Runner Through A4
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-AC-CURRENT-BOUNDARY AC: No False Completion Claim
      STATEMENT: GHOST shall provide a projection and Prompt Builder capability that converts the current SuperPrompt state into retrieval-oriented projections, A3 comparison text, stage-visible engineered prompt previews, and the current final prompt_ready representation.

      This file shall define current implemented behavior through A4 and shall explicitly separate that behavior from the unfinished external LLM-call/send boundary, postponed A5 behavior, and future global Hard Rule integration.
    GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-SUPPORT-SECTION
    8.1. Supporting Context Section UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-SUPPORT-SECTION STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-ROOT SuperPrompt Projection and Prompt Builder Scope
    RELATIONS (Child):
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-SUPPORT-EMPTY Empty Supporting Context Omission
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-ACTIVEBRIEF-SOURCE Previous-Conversation Projection Source
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-MEMORY-CONTEXT-SOURCE Memory Context Source Precedence
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-DOCUMENT-SUMMARY-SOURCE Document Summary Source
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-RAW-DOCUMENT-STAGES Raw Document Evidence Stage Visibility
    STATEMENT: When supporting content exists, the renderer shall emit a top-level Supporting Context section after the Current User Request and shall mark that material as supporting only.
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-SUPPORT-EMPTY
      8.2. Empty Supporting Context Omission UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-SUPPORT-EMPTY STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-SUPPORT-SECTION Supporting Context Section
      STATEMENT: When no previous-summary/topic block, Memory Context, document summary, or raw document evidence is available, the renderer shall omit the entire Supporting Context section.
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-ACTIVEBRIEF-SOURCE
      8.3. Previous-Conversation Projection Source UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-ACTIVEBRIEF-SOURCE STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-SUPPORT-SECTION Supporting Context Section
      RELATIONS (Child):
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-ACTIVEBRIEF-FULL-ROUTES Full Previous-Conversation Summary Routes
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-ACTIVEBRIEF-TITLE-ROUTES Previous-Conversation Topic-Only Routes
      STATEMENT: The current previous-conversation summary/topic projection shall read the relation-classifier ActiveBrief snapshot from extras.activebrief_relation_activebrief together with activebrief_prompt_materiality and activebrief_topic_relation.
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-MEMORY-CONTEXT-SOURCE
      8.6. Memory Context Source Precedence UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-MEMORY-CONTEXT-SOURCE STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-SUPPORT-SECTION Supporting Context Section
      RELATIONS (Child):
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-MEMORY-CONTEXT-LABEL Memory Context Label and Priority
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-RAW-MEMORY-HIDDEN Raw Memory Retrieval Hidden by Default
      STATEMENT: The renderer shall read synthesized Memory Context first from SuperPrompt.memory_context_text and, when that field is empty, shall fall back to extras.memory_context_text.
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-DOCUMENT-SUMMARY-SOURCE
      8.9. Document Summary Source UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-DOCUMENT-SUMMARY-SOURCE STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-SUPPORT-SECTION Supporting Context Section
      RELATIONS (Child):
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-DOCUMENT-SUMMARY-LABEL Retrieved Project Evidence Summary
      STATEMENT: The renderer shall read the condensed document evidence summary directly from SuperPrompt.S_CTX_MD.
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-RAW-DOCUMENT-STAGES
      8.11. Raw Document Evidence Stage Visibility UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-RAW-DOCUMENT-STAGES STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-SUPPORT-SECTION Supporting Context Section
      RELATIONS (Child):
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-RAW-DOCUMENT-STRUCTURE Raw Document Evidence Structure
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-DOCUMENT-ORDERING Raw Document Ordering
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-DOCUMENT-ID-MAP Temporary Chunk-ID Map
      STATEMENT: The current renderer may show raw retrieved document evidence before A4.

      When SuperPrompt.stage is a4 or a5, the renderer shall hide raw document chunks from the normal prompt-ready preview.
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-SUPPORT-SECTION
      8.1. Supporting Context Section UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-SUPPORT-SECTION STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-ROOT SuperPrompt Projection and Prompt Builder Scope
      RELATIONS (Child):
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-SUPPORT-EMPTY Empty Supporting Context Omission
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-ACTIVEBRIEF-SOURCE Previous-Conversation Projection Source
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-MEMORY-CONTEXT-SOURCE Memory Context Source Precedence
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-DOCUMENT-SUMMARY-SOURCE Document Summary Source
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-RAW-DOCUMENT-STAGES Raw Document Evidence Stage Visibility
      STATEMENT: When supporting content exists, the renderer shall emit a top-level Supporting Context section after the Current User Request and shall mark that material as supporting only.
    GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-SUPPORT-EMPTY
    8.2. Empty Supporting Context Omission UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-SUPPORT-EMPTY STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-SUPPORT-SECTION Supporting Context Section
    STATEMENT: When no previous-summary/topic block, Memory Context, document summary, or raw document evidence is available, the renderer shall omit the entire Supporting Context section.
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-SUPPORT-SECTION
      8.1. Supporting Context Section UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-SUPPORT-SECTION STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-ROOT SuperPrompt Projection and Prompt Builder Scope
      RELATIONS (Child):
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-SUPPORT-EMPTY Empty Supporting Context Omission
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-ACTIVEBRIEF-SOURCE Previous-Conversation Projection Source
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-MEMORY-CONTEXT-SOURCE Memory Context Source Precedence
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-DOCUMENT-SUMMARY-SOURCE Document Summary Source
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-RAW-DOCUMENT-STAGES Raw Document Evidence Stage Visibility
      STATEMENT: When supporting content exists, the renderer shall emit a top-level Supporting Context section after the Current User Request and shall mark that material as supporting only.
    GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-ACTIVEBRIEF-SOURCE
    8.3. Previous-Conversation Projection Source UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-ACTIVEBRIEF-SOURCE STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-SUPPORT-SECTION Supporting Context Section
    RELATIONS (Child):
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-ACTIVEBRIEF-FULL-ROUTES Full Previous-Conversation Summary Routes
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-ACTIVEBRIEF-TITLE-ROUTES Previous-Conversation Topic-Only Routes
    STATEMENT: The current previous-conversation summary/topic projection shall read the relation-classifier ActiveBrief snapshot from extras.activebrief_relation_activebrief together with activebrief_prompt_materiality and activebrief_topic_relation.
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-ACTIVEBRIEF-FULL-ROUTES
      8.4. Full Previous-Conversation Summary Routes UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-ACTIVEBRIEF-FULL-ROUTES STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-ACTIVEBRIEF-SOURCE Previous-Conversation Projection Source
      STATEMENT: The current renderer shall permit a full Previous Conversation Summary for:

      - STRONG SAME_TOPIC;
      - STRONG RELATED_DOMAIN;
      - WEAK SAME_TOPIC; and
      - WEAK IRRELEVANT.

      When available, the summary may contain the ActiveBrief title and body.
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-ACTIVEBRIEF-TITLE-ROUTES
      8.5. Previous-Conversation Topic-Only Routes UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-ACTIVEBRIEF-TITLE-ROUTES STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-ACTIVEBRIEF-SOURCE Previous-Conversation Projection Source
      STATEMENT: The current renderer shall permit only the Previous Conversation Topic title for:

      - STRONG IRRELEVANT; and
      - WEAK RELATED_DOMAIN.
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-ACTIVEBRIEF-SOURCE
      8.3. Previous-Conversation Projection Source UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-ACTIVEBRIEF-SOURCE STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-SUPPORT-SECTION Supporting Context Section
      RELATIONS (Child):
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-ACTIVEBRIEF-FULL-ROUTES Full Previous-Conversation Summary Routes
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-ACTIVEBRIEF-TITLE-ROUTES Previous-Conversation Topic-Only Routes
      STATEMENT: The current previous-conversation summary/topic projection shall read the relation-classifier ActiveBrief snapshot from extras.activebrief_relation_activebrief together with activebrief_prompt_materiality and activebrief_topic_relation.
    GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-ACTIVEBRIEF-FULL-ROUTES
    8.4. Full Previous-Conversation Summary Routes UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-ACTIVEBRIEF-FULL-ROUTES STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-ACTIVEBRIEF-SOURCE Previous-Conversation Projection Source
    STATEMENT: The current renderer shall permit a full Previous Conversation Summary for:

    - STRONG SAME_TOPIC;
    - STRONG RELATED_DOMAIN;
    - WEAK SAME_TOPIC; and
    - WEAK IRRELEVANT.

    When available, the summary may contain the ActiveBrief title and body.
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-ACTIVEBRIEF-SOURCE
      8.3. Previous-Conversation Projection Source UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-ACTIVEBRIEF-SOURCE STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-SUPPORT-SECTION Supporting Context Section
      RELATIONS (Child):
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-ACTIVEBRIEF-FULL-ROUTES Full Previous-Conversation Summary Routes
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-ACTIVEBRIEF-TITLE-ROUTES Previous-Conversation Topic-Only Routes
      STATEMENT: The current previous-conversation summary/topic projection shall read the relation-classifier ActiveBrief snapshot from extras.activebrief_relation_activebrief together with activebrief_prompt_materiality and activebrief_topic_relation.
    GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-ACTIVEBRIEF-TITLE-ROUTES
    8.5. Previous-Conversation Topic-Only Routes UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-ACTIVEBRIEF-TITLE-ROUTES STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-ACTIVEBRIEF-SOURCE Previous-Conversation Projection Source
    STATEMENT: The current renderer shall permit only the Previous Conversation Topic title for:

    - STRONG IRRELEVANT; and
    - WEAK RELATED_DOMAIN.
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-SUPPORT-SECTION
      8.1. Supporting Context Section UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-SUPPORT-SECTION STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-ROOT SuperPrompt Projection and Prompt Builder Scope
      RELATIONS (Child):
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-SUPPORT-EMPTY Empty Supporting Context Omission
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-ACTIVEBRIEF-SOURCE Previous-Conversation Projection Source
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-MEMORY-CONTEXT-SOURCE Memory Context Source Precedence
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-DOCUMENT-SUMMARY-SOURCE Document Summary Source

      STATEMENT: When supporting content exists, the renderer shall emit a top-level Supporting Context section after the Current User Request and shall mark that material as supporting only.
    GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-MEMORY-CONTEXT-SOURCE
    8.6. Memory Context Source Precedence UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-MEMORY-CONTEXT-SOURCE STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-SUPPORT-SECTION Supporting Context Section
    RELATIONS (Child):
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-MEMORY-CONTEXT-LABEL Memory Context Label and Priority
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-RAW-MEMORY-HIDDEN Raw Memory Retrieval Hidden by Default
    STATEMENT: The renderer shall read synthesized Memory Context first from SuperPrompt.memory_context_text and, when that field is empty, shall fall back to extras.memory_context_text.
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-MEMORY-CONTEXT-LABEL
      8.7. Memory Context Label and Priority UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-MEMORY-CONTEXT-LABEL STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-MEMORY-CONTEXT-SOURCE Memory Context Source Precedence
      STATEMENT: Non-empty synthesized Memory Context shall be rendered under a Memory Context subsection and shall be identified as background support rather than as the current task.
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-RAW-MEMORY-HIDDEN
      8.8. Raw Memory Retrieval Hidden by Default UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-RAW-MEMORY-HIDDEN STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-MEMORY-CONTEXT-SOURCE Memory Context Source Precedence
      STATEMENT: The normal current prompt-ready rendering path shall not display raw MemoryContextPack episodes, semantic chunks, or memory debug Markdown.

      Raw memory debug Markdown may remain available for diagnostics through the backward-compatible debug renderer.
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-MEMORY-CONTEXT-SOURCE
      8.6. Memory Context Source Precedence UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-MEMORY-CONTEXT-SOURCE STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-SUPPORT-SECTION Supporting Context Section
      RELATIONS (Child):
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-MEMORY-CONTEXT-LABEL Memory Context Label and Priority
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-RAW-MEMORY-HIDDEN Raw Memory Retrieval Hidden by Default
      STATEMENT: The renderer shall read synthesized Memory Context first from SuperPrompt.memory_context_text and, when that field is empty, shall fall back to extras.memory_context_text.
    GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-MEMORY-CONTEXT-LABEL
    8.7. Memory Context Label and Priority UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-MEMORY-CONTEXT-LABEL STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-MEMORY-CONTEXT-SOURCE Memory Context Source Precedence
    STATEMENT: Non-empty synthesized Memory Context shall be rendered under a Memory Context subsection and shall be identified as background support rather than as the current task.
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-MEMORY-CONTEXT-SOURCE
      8.6. Memory Context Source Precedence UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-MEMORY-CONTEXT-SOURCE STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-SUPPORT-SECTION Supporting Context Section
      RELATIONS (Child):
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-MEMORY-CONTEXT-LABEL Memory Context Label and Priority
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-RAW-MEMORY-HIDDEN Raw Memory Retrieval Hidden by Default
      STATEMENT: The renderer shall read synthesized Memory Context first from SuperPrompt.memory_context_text and, when that field is empty, shall fall back to extras.memory_context_text.
    GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-RAW-MEMORY-HIDDEN
    8.8. Raw Memory Retrieval Hidden by Default UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-RAW-MEMORY-HIDDEN STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-MEMORY-CONTEXT-SOURCE Memory Context Source Precedence
    STATEMENT: The normal current prompt-ready rendering path shall not display raw MemoryContextPack episodes, semantic chunks, or memory debug Markdown.

    Raw memory debug Markdown may remain available for diagnostics through the backward-compatible debug renderer.
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-SUPPORT-SECTION
      8.1. Supporting Context Section UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-SUPPORT-SECTION STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-ROOT SuperPrompt Projection and Prompt Builder Scope
      RELATIONS (Child):
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-SUPPORT-EMPTY Empty Supporting Context Omission
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-ACTIVEBRIEF-SOURCE Previous-Conversation Projection Source
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-MEMORY-CONTEXT-SOURCE Memory Context Source Precedence
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-DOCUMENT-SUMMARY-SOURCE Document Summary Source
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-RAW-DOCUMENT-STAGES Raw Document Evidence Stage Visibility
      STATEMENT: When supporting content exists, the renderer shall emit a top-level Supporting Context section after the Current User Request and shall mark that material as supporting only.
    GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-DOCUMENT-SUMMARY-SOURCE
    8.9. Document Summary Source UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-DOCUMENT-SUMMARY-SOURCE STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-SUPPORT-SECTION Supporting Context Section
    RELATIONS (Child):
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-DOCUMENT-SUMMARY-LABEL Retrieved Project Evidence Summary
    STATEMENT: The renderer shall read the condensed document evidence summary directly from SuperPrompt.S_CTX_MD.
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-DOCUMENT-SUMMARY-LABEL
      8.10. Retrieved Project Evidence Summary UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-DOCUMENT-SUMMARY-LABEL STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-DOCUMENT-SUMMARY-SOURCE Document Summary Source
      STATEMENT: Non-empty S_CTX_MD shall be rendered under Retrieved Project Evidence Summary and shall be identified as supporting project evidence rather than as the current task.
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-DOCUMENT-SUMMARY-SOURCE
      8.9. Document Summary Source UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-DOCUMENT-SUMMARY-SOURCE STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-SUPPORT-SECTION Supporting Context Section
      RELATIONS (Child):
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-DOCUMENT-SUMMARY-LABEL Retrieved Project Evidence Summary
      STATEMENT: The renderer shall read the condensed document evidence summary directly from SuperPrompt.S_CTX_MD.
    GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-DOCUMENT-SUMMARY-LABEL
    8.10. Retrieved Project Evidence Summary UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-DOCUMENT-SUMMARY-LABEL STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-DOCUMENT-SUMMARY-SOURCE Document Summary Source
    STATEMENT: Non-empty S_CTX_MD shall be rendered under Retrieved Project Evidence Summary and shall be identified as supporting project evidence rather than as the current task.
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-SUPPORT-SECTION
      8.1. Supporting Context Section UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-SUPPORT-SECTION STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-ROOT SuperPrompt Projection and Prompt Builder Scope
      RELATIONS (Child):
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-SUPPORT-EMPTY Empty Supporting Context Omission
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-ACTIVEBRIEF-SOURCE Previous-Conversation Projection Source
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-MEMORY-CONTEXT-SOURCE Memory Context Source Precedence
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-DOCUMENT-SUMMARY-SOURCE Document Summary Source
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-RAW-DOCUMENT-STAGES Raw Document Evidence Stage Visibility
      STATEMENT: When supporting content exists, the renderer shall emit a top-level Supporting Context section after the Current User Request and shall mark that material as supporting only.
    GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-RAW-DOCUMENT-STAGES
    8.11. Raw Document Evidence Stage Visibility UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-RAW-DOCUMENT-STAGES STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-SUPPORT-SECTION Supporting Context Section
    RELATIONS (Child):
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-RAW-DOCUMENT-STRUCTURE Raw Document Evidence Structure
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-DOCUMENT-ORDERING Raw Document Ordering
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-DOCUMENT-ID-MAP Temporary Chunk-ID Map
    STATEMENT: The current renderer may show raw retrieved document evidence before A4.

    When SuperPrompt.stage is a4 or a5, the renderer shall hide raw document chunks from the normal prompt-ready preview.
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-RAW-DOCUMENT-STRUCTURE
      8.12. Raw Document Evidence Structure UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-RAW-DOCUMENT-STRUCTURE STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-RAW-DOCUMENT-STAGES Raw Document Evidence Stage Visibility
      STATEMENT: Raw document evidence shall be rendered as a retrieved_chunks structure with per-chunk index, stable chunk identifier, optional source, optional score/status information, and sanitized chunk text.

      Detailed A3/A4 sanitization and evidence semantics remain owned by 43_evidence_selection_and_condensation.sdoc.
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-DOCUMENT-ORDERING
      8.13. Raw Document Ordering UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-DOCUMENT-ORDERING STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-RAW-DOCUMENT-STAGES Raw Document Evidence Stage Visibility
      STATEMENT: The current projector shall order raw document evidence by this precedence:

      1. A3 stage rows when stage is a3;
      2. final_selection_ids when present;
      3. the current stage view when present; and
      4. base_context_chunks order otherwise.
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-DOCUMENT-ID-MAP
      8.14. Temporary Chunk-ID Map UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-DOCUMENT-ID-MAP STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-RAW-DOCUMENT-STAGES Raw Document Evidence Stage Visibility
      STATEMENT: Before ordered raw-document rendering, the current projector shall create a temporary map from stable chunk identifier to hydrated chunk object.

      This behavior shall not be represented as semantic duplicate detection across different chunk identifiers or across Knowledge and Memory Context.
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-RAW-DOCUMENT-STAGES
      8.11. Raw Document Evidence Stage Visibility UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-RAW-DOCUMENT-STAGES STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-SUPPORT-SECTION Supporting Context Section
      RELATIONS (Child):
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-RAW-DOCUMENT-STRUCTURE Raw Document Evidence Structure
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-DOCUMENT-ORDERING Raw Document Ordering
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-DOCUMENT-ID-MAP Temporary Chunk-ID Map
      STATEMENT: The current renderer may show raw retrieved document evidence before A4.

      When SuperPrompt.stage is a4 or a5, the renderer shall hide raw document chunks from the normal prompt-ready preview.
    GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-RAW-DOCUMENT-STRUCTURE
    8.12. Raw Document Evidence Structure UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-RAW-DOCUMENT-STRUCTURE STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-RAW-DOCUMENT-STAGES Raw Document Evidence Stage Visibility
    STATEMENT: Raw document evidence shall be rendered as a retrieved_chunks structure with per-chunk index, stable chunk identifier, optional source, optional score/status information, and sanitized chunk text.

    Detailed A3/A4 sanitization and evidence semantics remain owned by 43_evidence_selection_and_condensation.sdoc.
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-RAW-DOCUMENT-STAGES
      8.11. Raw Document Evidence Stage Visibility UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-RAW-DOCUMENT-STAGES STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-SUPPORT-SECTION Supporting Context Section
      RELATIONS (Child):
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-RAW-DOCUMENT-STRUCTURE Raw Document Evidence Structure
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-DOCUMENT-ORDERING Raw Document Ordering
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-DOCUMENT-ID-MAP Temporary Chunk-ID Map
      STATEMENT: The current renderer may show raw retrieved document evidence before A4.

      When SuperPrompt.stage is a4 or a5, the renderer shall hide raw document chunks from the normal prompt-ready preview.
    GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-DOCUMENT-ORDERING
    8.13. Raw Document Ordering UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-DOCUMENT-ORDERING STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-RAW-DOCUMENT-STAGES Raw Document Evidence Stage Visibility
    STATEMENT: The current projector shall order raw document evidence by this precedence:

    1. A3 stage rows when stage is a3;
    2. final_selection_ids when present;
    3. the current stage view when present; and
    4. base_context_chunks order otherwise.
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-RAW-DOCUMENT-STAGES
      8.11. Raw Document Evidence Stage Visibility UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-RAW-DOCUMENT-STAGES STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-SUPPORT-SECTION Supporting Context Section
      RELATIONS (Child):
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-RAW-DOCUMENT-STRUCTURE Raw Document Evidence Structure
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-DOCUMENT-ORDERING Raw Document Ordering
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-DOCUMENT-ID-MAP Temporary Chunk-ID Map
      STATEMENT: The current renderer may show raw retrieved document evidence before A4.

      When SuperPrompt.stage is a4 or a5, the renderer shall hide raw document chunks from the normal prompt-ready preview.
    GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-DOCUMENT-ID-MAP
    8.14. Temporary Chunk-ID Map UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-DOCUMENT-ID-MAP STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-RAW-DOCUMENT-STAGES Raw Document Evidence Stage Visibility
    STATEMENT: Before ordered raw-document rendering, the current projector shall create a temporary map from stable chunk identifier to hydrated chunk object.

    This behavior shall not be represented as semantic duplicate detection across different chunk identifiers or across Knowledge and Memory Context.

    9. 9. Final prompt_ready Composition
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-ROOT
      1.1. SuperPrompt Projection and Prompt Builder Scope UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-ROOT STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
      • GHOST-CONTEXT-INTEGRATION-ROOT Context Integration and Prompt Assembly Scope
      RELATIONS (Child):
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-SOURCE-AUTHORITY Source-Code Authority
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-LEGACY-STUB Legacy PromptBuilder Stub Boundary
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-AUTHORITATIVE-STATE Authoritative Shared State
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-WRAPPER Stable Composition Wrapper
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-PROJECTOR-CONSTRUCTOR Projector Input Validation
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-DERIVED-LOGIC Derived Projection Logic Ownership
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-NO-STAGE-ALGORITHM-OWNERSHIP No Upstream Algorithm Ownership
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-QUERY-INPUTS Query Projection Inputs
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-A3-WRAPPER A3 Evaluation Wrapper
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-SYSTEM-HEADING System Section
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-CONFIG-SECTION Configuration Section
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-REQUEST-SECTION Current User Request Section
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-SUPPORT-SECTION Supporting Context Section
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-COMPOSE-SYSTEM System_MD Rebuild
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-COMPOSE-PROMPT Prompt_MD Rebuild
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-COMPOSE-ORDER prompt_ready Assembly Order
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-RUNNER-STEPS Current Executable Runner Steps
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-CURRENT-GUI-OUTPUT Current Operational Output
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-NO-SEND-IMPLEMENTATION No Completed External Send Boundary
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-A5-POSTPONED A5 Postponed Boundary
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-HARD-RULE-POSTPONED Global Hard Rule Integration Postponed
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-FUTURE-SEND-SAME-ASSEMBLY Future Send Uses Authoritative Assembly
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-FUTURE-NO-API-INVENTION No Invented Send API
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-NO-MISSING-CONTEXT-FABRICATION Missing Context Omission
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-NO-RAW-MEMORY-LEAK No Default Raw Memory Leakage
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-STRUCTURE-SAFETY Raw Evidence Structural Safety
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-NO-DURABLE-MUTATION No Durable Store Mutation
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-AC-ORDER AC: Composition Order
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-AC-A4-RAW-HIDDEN AC: Raw Document Evidence Hidden After A4
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-AC-RAW-MEMORY-HIDDEN AC: Raw Memory Hidden
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-AC-RUNNER AC: Runner Through A4
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-AC-CURRENT-BOUNDARY AC: No False Completion Claim
      STATEMENT: GHOST shall provide a projection and Prompt Builder capability that converts the current SuperPrompt state into retrieval-oriented projections, A3 comparison text, stage-visible engineered prompt previews, and the current final prompt_ready representation.

      This file shall define current implemented behavior through A4 and shall explicitly separate that behavior from the unfinished external LLM-call/send boundary, postponed A5 behavior, and future global Hard Rule integration.
    GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-COMPOSE-SYSTEM
    9.1. System_MD Rebuild UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-COMPOSE-SYSTEM STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-ROOT SuperPrompt Projection and Prompt Builder Scope
    STATEMENT: Each central composition call shall rebuild SuperPrompt.System_MD from current SuperPrompt state.
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-ROOT
      1.1. SuperPrompt Projection and Prompt Builder Scope UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-ROOT STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
      • GHOST-CONTEXT-INTEGRATION-ROOT Context Integration and Prompt Assembly Scope
      RELATIONS (Child):
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-SOURCE-AUTHORITY Source-Code Authority

      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-WRAPPER Stable Composition Wrapper
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-PROJECTOR-CONSTRUCTOR Projector Input Validation
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-DERIVED-LOGIC Derived Projection Logic Ownership
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-NO-STAGE-ALGORITHM-OWNERSHIP No Upstream Algorithm Ownership
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-QUERY-INPUTS Query Projection Inputs
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-A3-WRAPPER A3 Evaluation Wrapper

      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-CONFIG-SECTION Configuration Section
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-REQUEST-SECTION Current User Request Section
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-SUPPORT-SECTION Supporting Context Section

      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-COMPOSE-ORDER prompt_ready Assembly Order
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-RUNNER-STEPS Current Executable Runner Steps
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-CURRENT-GUI-OUTPUT Current Operational Output
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-NO-SEND-IMPLEMENTATION No Completed External Send Boundary
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-A5-POSTPONED A5 Postponed Boundary
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-HARD-RULE-POSTPONED Global Hard Rule Integration Postponed
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-FUTURE-SEND-SAME-ASSEMBLY Future Send Uses Authoritative Assembly
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-FUTURE-NO-API-INVENTION No Invented Send API
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-NO-MISSING-CONTEXT-FABRICATION Missing Context Omission
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-NO-RAW-MEMORY-LEAK No Default Raw Memory Leakage

      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-NO-DURABLE-MUTATION No Durable Store Mutation

      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-AC-RAW-MEMORY-HIDDEN AC: Raw Memory Hidden
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-AC-RUNNER AC: Runner Through A4
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-AC-CURRENT-BOUNDARY AC: No False Completion Claim
      STATEMENT: GHOST shall provide a projection and Prompt Builder capability that converts the current SuperPrompt state into retrieval-oriented projections, A3 comparison text, stage-visible engineered prompt previews, and the current final prompt_ready representation.

      This file shall define current implemented behavior through A4 and shall explicitly separate that behavior from the unfinished external LLM-call/send boundary, postponed A5 behavior, and future global Hard Rule integration.
    GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-COMPOSE-PROMPT
    9.2. Prompt_MD Rebuild UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-COMPOSE-PROMPT STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-ROOT SuperPrompt Projection and Prompt Builder Scope
    STATEMENT: Each central composition call shall rebuild SuperPrompt.Prompt_MD from current SuperPrompt state.
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-ROOT
      1.1. SuperPrompt Projection and Prompt Builder Scope UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-ROOT STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
      • GHOST-CONTEXT-INTEGRATION-ROOT Context Integration and Prompt Assembly Scope

      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-CURRENT-GUI-OUTPUT Current Operational Output

      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-HARD-RULE-POSTPONED Global Hard Rule Integration Postponed

      STATEMENT: GHOST shall provide a projection and Prompt Builder capability that converts the current SuperPrompt state into retrieval-oriented projections, A3 comparison text, stage-visible engineered prompt previews, and the current final prompt_ready representation.

      This file shall define current implemented behavior through A4 and shall explicitly separate that behavior from the unfinished external LLM-call/send boundary, postponed A5 behavior, and future global Hard Rule integration.
    GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-COMPOSE-ORDER
    9.3. prompt_ready Assembly Order UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-COMPOSE-ORDER STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-ROOT SuperPrompt Projection and Prompt Builder Scope
    RELATIONS (Child):
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-COMPOSE-JOIN Prompt Part Separation
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-ATTACHMENTS Attachment Block Boundary
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-NO-FINAL-ANSWER Composition Is Not Answer Generation
    STATEMENT: The current central composer shall append non-empty prompt parts in this order:

    1. System_MD;
    2. Prompt_MD;
    3. rendered Supporting Context; and
    4. Attachments_MD.
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-COMPOSE-JOIN
      9.4. Prompt Part Separation UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-COMPOSE-JOIN STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-COMPOSE-ORDER prompt_ready Assembly Order
      STATEMENT: The current composer shall join non-empty prompt parts with blank-line separation, trim the result, assign it to SuperPrompt.prompt_ready, and return that same string.
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-ATTACHMENTS
      9.5. Attachment Block Boundary UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-ATTACHMENTS STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-COMPOSE-ORDER prompt_ready Assembly Order
      STATEMENT: When SuperPrompt.Attachments_MD is already non-empty, the current composer shall append it after Supporting Context.

      The provided current projection code does not itself load, parse, validate, or create attachment content.
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-NO-FINAL-ANSWER
      9.6. Composition Is Not Answer Generation UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-NO-FINAL-ANSWER STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-COMPOSE-ORDER prompt_ready Assembly Order
      STATEMENT: Assigning prompt_ready shall create an engineered prompt artifact and shall not generate a final answer to the user.
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-COMPOSE-ORDER
      9.3. prompt_ready Assembly Order UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-COMPOSE-ORDER STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-ROOT SuperPrompt Projection and Prompt Builder Scope
      RELATIONS (Child):
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-COMPOSE-JOIN Prompt Part Separation
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-ATTACHMENTS Attachment Block Boundary
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-NO-FINAL-ANSWER Composition Is Not Answer Generation
      STATEMENT: The current central composer shall append non-empty prompt parts in this order:

      1. System_MD;
      2. Prompt_MD;
      3. rendered Supporting Context; and
      4. Attachments_MD.
    GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-COMPOSE-JOIN
    9.4. Prompt Part Separation UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-COMPOSE-JOIN STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-COMPOSE-ORDER prompt_ready Assembly Order
    STATEMENT: The current composer shall join non-empty prompt parts with blank-line separation, trim the result, assign it to SuperPrompt.prompt_ready, and return that same string.
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-COMPOSE-ORDER
      9.3. prompt_ready Assembly Order UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-COMPOSE-ORDER STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):

      4. Attachments_MD.
    GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-ATTACHMENTS
    9.5. Attachment Block Boundary UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-ATTACHMENTS STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-COMPOSE-ORDER prompt_ready Assembly Order
    STATEMENT: When SuperPrompt.Attachments_MD is already non-empty, the current composer shall append it after Supporting Context.

    The provided current projection code does not itself load, parse, validate, or create attachment content.
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-COMPOSE-ORDER
      9.3. prompt_ready Assembly Order UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-COMPOSE-ORDER STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-ROOT SuperPrompt Projection and Prompt Builder Scope
      RELATIONS (Child):
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-COMPOSE-JOIN Prompt Part Separation
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-ATTACHMENTS Attachment Block Boundary
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-NO-FINAL-ANSWER Composition Is Not Answer Generation

      1. System_MD;
      2. Prompt_MD;
      3. rendered Supporting Context; and
      4. Attachments_MD.
    GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-NO-FINAL-ANSWER
    9.6. Composition Is Not Answer Generation UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-NO-FINAL-ANSWER STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-COMPOSE-ORDER prompt_ready Assembly Order
    STATEMENT: Assigning prompt_ready shall create an engineered prompt artifact and shall not generate a final answer to the user.

    10. 10. Current Prompt Builder Runner
    The current Prompt Builder frontend runner executes one stage per Streamlit rerun cycle and writes intermediate snapshots into session state.
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-ROOT
      1.1. SuperPrompt Projection and Prompt Builder Scope UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-ROOT STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
      • GHOST-CONTEXT-INTEGRATION-ROOT Context Integration and Prompt Assembly Scope
      RELATIONS (Child):
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-SOURCE-AUTHORITY Source-Code Authority
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-LEGACY-STUB Legacy PromptBuilder Stub Boundary
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-AUTHORITATIVE-STATE Authoritative Shared State
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-WRAPPER Stable Composition Wrapper
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-PROJECTOR-CONSTRUCTOR Projector Input Validation
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-DERIVED-LOGIC Derived Projection Logic Ownership
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-NO-STAGE-ALGORITHM-OWNERSHIP No Upstream Algorithm Ownership
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-QUERY-INPUTS Query Projection Inputs
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-A3-WRAPPER A3 Evaluation Wrapper
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-SYSTEM-HEADING System Section
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-CONFIG-SECTION Configuration Section
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-REQUEST-SECTION Current User Request Section
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-SUPPORT-SECTION Supporting Context Section
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-COMPOSE-SYSTEM System_MD Rebuild
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-COMPOSE-PROMPT Prompt_MD Rebuild
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-COMPOSE-ORDER prompt_ready Assembly Order
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-RUNNER-STEPS Current Executable Runner Steps
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-CURRENT-GUI-OUTPUT Current Operational Output
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-NO-SEND-IMPLEMENTATION No Completed External Send Boundary
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-A5-POSTPONED A5 Postponed Boundary
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-HARD-RULE-POSTPONED Global Hard Rule Integration Postponed
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-FUTURE-SEND-SAME-ASSEMBLY Future Send Uses Authoritative Assembly
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-FUTURE-NO-API-INVENTION No Invented Send API
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-NO-MISSING-CONTEXT-FABRICATION Missing Context Omission
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-NO-RAW-MEMORY-LEAK No Default Raw Memory Leakage
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-STRUCTURE-SAFETY Raw Evidence Structural Safety
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-NO-DURABLE-MUTATION No Durable Store Mutation
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-AC-ORDER AC: Composition Order
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-AC-A4-RAW-HIDDEN AC: Raw Document Evidence Hidden After A4
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-AC-RAW-MEMORY-HIDDEN AC: Raw Memory Hidden
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-AC-RUNNER AC: Runner Through A4
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-AC-CURRENT-BOUNDARY AC: No False Completion Claim
      STATEMENT: GHOST shall provide a projection and Prompt Builder capability that converts the current SuperPrompt state into retrieval-oriented projections, A3 comparison text, stage-visible engineered prompt previews, and the current final prompt_ready representation.

      This file shall define current implemented behavior through A4 and shall explicitly separate that behavior from the unfinished external LLM-call/send boundary, postponed A5 behavior, and future global Hard Rule integration.
    GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-RUNNER-STEPS
    10.1. Current Executable Runner Steps UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-RUNNER-STEPS STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-ROOT SuperPrompt Projection and Prompt Builder Scope
    RELATIONS (Child):
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-RUNNER-PROMPT-GUARD Prompt Input Guard
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-RUNNER-PROJECT-GUARD Active Project Guard
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-RUNNER-NEW-STATE New SuperPrompt at Preprocessing Start
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-RUNNER-MEMORY-RETRIEVAL Memory Retrieval in Retrieval Step
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-RUNNER-RERANK-PASSTHROUGH ReRanker Pass-Through
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-RUNNER-SNAPSHOTS Stage Snapshots
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-RUNNER-GUI-WRITEBACK GUI Prompt Preview Write-Back
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-RUNNER-STAGE-COMPOSITION Stage Composition Calls
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-RUNNER-HARD-RULE-VISUAL Hard Rule Visual Step Is Not Execution
    STATEMENT: The current live Prompt Builder runner shall execute these six steps in order:

    1. Pre-Processing;
    2. A2-PromptShaper;
    3. Retrieval;
    4. ReRanker or retrieval pass-through;
    5. A3 NLI Gate; and
    6. A4 Condenser.
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-RUNNER-PROMPT-GUARD
      10.2. Prompt Input Guard UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-RUNNER-PROMPT-GUARD STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-RUNNER-STEPS Current Executable Runner Steps
      STATEMENT: The current runner shall reject empty or whitespace-only prompt input before pipeline execution.
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-RUNNER-PROJECT-GUARD
      10.3. Active Project Guard UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-RUNNER-PROJECT-GUARD STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-RUNNER-STEPS Current Executable Runner Steps
      STATEMENT: The current runner shall reject execution when no active project is available.

      The provided current runner therefore shall not be described as implementing a complete prompt-only mode that bypasses the project requirement.
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-RUNNER-NEW-STATE
      10.4. New SuperPrompt at Preprocessing Start UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-RUNNER-NEW-STATE STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-RUNNER-STEPS Current Executable Runner Steps
      STATEMENT: At the first automated runner step, the current implementation shall create a new SuperPrompt and pass it through controller preprocessing.
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-RUNNER-MEMORY-RETRIEVAL
      10.5. Memory Retrieval in Retrieval Step UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-RUNNER-MEMORY-RETRIEVAL STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-RUNNER-STEPS Current Executable Runner Steps
      STATEMENT: During the current Retrieval runner step, the controller shall run document retrieval and shall also attempt Memory Retrieval when MemoryRetriever has been configured.

      Memory output shall remain separately represented in SuperPrompt from document candidate views.
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-RUNNER-RERANK-PASSTHROUGH
      10.6. ReRanker Pass-Through UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-RUNNER-RERANK-PASSTHROUGH STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-RUNNER-STEPS Current Executable Runner Steps
      STATEMENT: When ColBERT reranking is disabled, the current runner shall skip the real reranker and shall rely on the retrieval-created A3-ready reranked pass-through view.
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-RUNNER-SNAPSHOTS
      10.7. Stage Snapshots UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-RUNNER-SNAPSHOTS STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-RUNNER-STEPS Current Executable Runner Steps
      STATEMENT: The current runner shall create deep-copy snapshots at the implemented inspection points sp_pre, sp_a2, sp_rtv, sp_rrk, sp_a3, and sp_a4.
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-RUNNER-GUI-WRITEBACK
      10.8. GUI Prompt Preview Write-Back UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-RUNNER-GUI-WRITEBACK STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-RUNNER-STEPS Current Executable Runner Steps
      STATEMENT: After each completed runner step, the current UI action shall store the updated SuperPrompt and shall write sp.prompt_ready into the GUI session-state engineered-prompt text field.
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-RUNNER-STAGE-COMPOSITION
      10.9. Stage Composition Calls UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-RUNNER-STAGE-COMPOSITION STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-RUNNER-STEPS Current Executable Runner Steps
      STATEMENT: Current stage implementations or runner actions shall recompose prompt_ready after preprocessing, A2, Retrieval, ReRanker/pass-through, A3, and A4 according to their current wiring.
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-RUNNER-HARD-RULE-VISUAL
      10.10. Hard Rule Visual Step Is Not Execution UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-RUNNER-HARD-RULE-VISUAL STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-RUNNER-STEPS Current Executable Runner Steps
      STATEMENT: After the six executable steps complete, the current UI may advance the sidebar/status display through Hard Rule Integration and LLM-Ready Context labels.

      That visual progression shall not be interpreted as execution of a global Hard Rule engine or a final external model call.
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-RUNNER-STEPS
      10.1. Current Executable Runner Steps UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-RUNNER-STEPS STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-ROOT SuperPrompt Projection and Prompt Builder Scope
      RELATIONS (Child):
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-RUNNER-PROMPT-GUARD Prompt Input Guard
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-RUNNER-PROJECT-GUARD Active Project Guard
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-RUNNER-NEW-STATE New SuperPrompt at Preprocessing Start
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-RUNNER-MEMORY-RETRIEVAL Memory Retrieval in Retrieval Step
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-RUNNER-RERANK-PASSTHROUGH ReRanker Pass-Through
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-RUNNER-SNAPSHOTS Stage Snapshots
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-RUNNER-GUI-WRITEBACK GUI Prompt Preview Write-Back
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-RUNNER-STAGE-COMPOSITION Stage Composition Calls
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-RUNNER-HARD-RULE-VISUAL Hard Rule Visual Step Is Not Execution
      STATEMENT: The current live Prompt Builder runner shall execute these six steps in order:

      1. Pre-Processing;
      2. A2-PromptShaper;
      3. Retrieval;
      4. ReRanker or retrieval pass-through;
      5. A3 NLI Gate; and
      6. A4 Condenser.
    GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-RUNNER-PROMPT-GUARD
    10.2. Prompt Input Guard UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-RUNNER-PROMPT-GUARD STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-RUNNER-STEPS Current Executable Runner Steps
    STATEMENT: The current runner shall reject empty or whitespace-only prompt input before pipeline execution.

    STATEMENT: The current runner shall reject execution when no active project is available.

    The provided current runner therefore shall not be described as implementing a complete prompt-only mode that bypasses the project requirement.

      4. ReRanker or retrieval pass-through;
      5. A3 NLI Gate; and
      6. A4 Condenser.
    GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-RUNNER-NEW-STATE
    10.4. New SuperPrompt at Preprocessing Start UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-RUNNER-NEW-STATE STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-RUNNER-STEPS Current Executable Runner Steps
    STATEMENT: At the first automated runner step, the current implementation shall create a new SuperPrompt and pass it through controller preprocessing.
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-RUNNER-STEPS
      10.1. Current Executable Runner Steps UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-RUNNER-STEPS STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-ROOT SuperPrompt Projection and Prompt Builder Scope
      RELATIONS (Child):
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-RUNNER-PROMPT-GUARD Prompt Input Guard
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-RUNNER-PROJECT-GUARD Active Project Guard
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-RUNNER-NEW-STATE New SuperPrompt at Preprocessing Start
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-RUNNER-MEMORY-RETRIEVAL Memory Retrieval in Retrieval Step
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-RUNNER-RERANK-PASSTHROUGH ReRanker Pass-Through
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-RUNNER-SNAPSHOTS Stage Snapshots
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-RUNNER-GUI-WRITEBACK GUI Prompt Preview Write-Back
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-RUNNER-STAGE-COMPOSITION Stage Composition Calls
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-RUNNER-HARD-RULE-VISUAL Hard Rule Visual Step Is Not Execution
      STATEMENT: The current live Prompt Builder runner shall execute these six steps in order:

      1. Pre-Processing;
      2. A2-PromptShaper;
      3. Retrieval;
      4. ReRanker or retrieval pass-through;
      5. A3 NLI Gate; and
      6. A4 Condenser.
    GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-RUNNER-MEMORY-RETRIEVAL
    10.5. Memory Retrieval in Retrieval Step UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-RUNNER-MEMORY-RETRIEVAL STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-RUNNER-STEPS Current Executable Runner Steps
    STATEMENT: During the current Retrieval runner step, the controller shall run document retrieval and shall also attempt Memory Retrieval when MemoryRetriever has been configured.

    Memory output shall remain separately represented in SuperPrompt from document candidate views.
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-RUNNER-STEPS
      10.1. Current Executable Runner Steps UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-RUNNER-STEPS STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-ROOT SuperPrompt Projection and Prompt Builder Scope
      RELATIONS (Child):
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-RUNNER-PROMPT-GUARD Prompt Input Guard
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-RUNNER-PROJECT-GUARD Active Project Guard

      STATEMENT: The current live Prompt Builder runner shall execute these six steps in order:

      1. Pre-Processing;
      2. A2-PromptShaper;
      3. Retrieval;
      4. ReRanker or retrieval pass-through;
      5. A3 NLI Gate; and
      6. A4 Condenser.
    GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-RUNNER-RERANK-PASSTHROUGH
    10.6. ReRanker Pass-Through UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-RUNNER-RERANK-PASSTHROUGH STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-RUNNER-STEPS Current Executable Runner Steps
    STATEMENT: When ColBERT reranking is disabled, the current runner shall skip the real reranker and shall rely on the retrieval-created A3-ready reranked pass-through view.
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-RUNNER-STEPS
      10.1. Current Executable Runner Steps UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-RUNNER-STEPS STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-ROOT SuperPrompt Projection and Prompt Builder Scope

      4. ReRanker or retrieval pass-through;

    GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-RUNNER-SNAPSHOTS
    10.7. Stage Snapshots UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-RUNNER-SNAPSHOTS STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-RUNNER-STEPS Current Executable Runner Steps
    STATEMENT: The current runner shall create deep-copy snapshots at the implemented inspection points sp_pre, sp_a2, sp_rtv, sp_rrk, sp_a3, and sp_a4.
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-RUNNER-STEPS

    GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-RUNNER-GUI-WRITEBACK
    10.8. GUI Prompt Preview Write-Back UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-RUNNER-GUI-WRITEBACK STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-RUNNER-STEPS Current Executable Runner Steps
    STATEMENT: After each completed runner step, the current UI action shall store the updated SuperPrompt and shall write sp.prompt_ready into the GUI session-state engineered-prompt text field.
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-RUNNER-STEPS

    10.9. Stage Composition Calls UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-RUNNER-STAGE-COMPOSITION STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-RUNNER-STEPS Current Executable Runner Steps
    STATEMENT: Current stage implementations or runner actions shall recompose prompt_ready after preprocessing, A2, Retrieval, ReRanker/pass-through, A3, and A4 according to their current wiring.

    10.10. Hard Rule Visual Step Is Not Execution UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-RUNNER-HARD-RULE-VISUAL STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-RUNNER-STEPS Current Executable Runner Steps
    STATEMENT: After the six executable steps complete, the current UI may advance the sidebar/status display through Hard Rule Integration and LLM-Ready Context labels.

    That visual progression shall not be interpreted as execution of a global Hard Rule engine or a final external model call.

    11. 11. Current and Future Operational Boundaries
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-ROOT
      1.1. SuperPrompt Projection and Prompt Builder Scope UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-ROOT STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
      • GHOST-CONTEXT-INTEGRATION-ROOT Context Integration and Prompt Assembly Scope
      RELATIONS (Child):
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-SOURCE-AUTHORITY Source-Code Authority
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-LEGACY-STUB Legacy PromptBuilder Stub Boundary
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-AUTHORITATIVE-STATE Authoritative Shared State
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-WRAPPER Stable Composition Wrapper
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-PROJECTOR-CONSTRUCTOR Projector Input Validation
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-DERIVED-LOGIC Derived Projection Logic Ownership
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-NO-STAGE-ALGORITHM-OWNERSHIP No Upstream Algorithm Ownership
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-QUERY-INPUTS Query Projection Inputs
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-A3-WRAPPER A3 Evaluation Wrapper
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-SYSTEM-HEADING System Section
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-CONFIG-SECTION Configuration Section
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-REQUEST-SECTION Current User Request Section
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-SUPPORT-SECTION Supporting Context Section
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-COMPOSE-SYSTEM System_MD Rebuild
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-COMPOSE-PROMPT Prompt_MD Rebuild
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-COMPOSE-ORDER prompt_ready Assembly Order
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-RUNNER-STEPS Current Executable Runner Steps
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-CURRENT-GUI-OUTPUT Current Operational Output
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-NO-SEND-IMPLEMENTATION No Completed External Send Boundary
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-A5-POSTPONED A5 Postponed Boundary
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-HARD-RULE-POSTPONED Global Hard Rule Integration Postponed
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-FUTURE-SEND-SAME-ASSEMBLY Future Send Uses Authoritative Assembly
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-FUTURE-NO-API-INVENTION No Invented Send API
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-NO-MISSING-CONTEXT-FABRICATION Missing Context Omission
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-NO-RAW-MEMORY-LEAK No Default Raw Memory Leakage
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-STRUCTURE-SAFETY Raw Evidence Structural Safety
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-NO-DURABLE-MUTATION No Durable Store Mutation
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-AC-ORDER AC: Composition Order
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-AC-A4-RAW-HIDDEN AC: Raw Document Evidence Hidden After A4
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-AC-RAW-MEMORY-HIDDEN AC: Raw Memory Hidden
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-AC-RUNNER AC: Runner Through A4
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-AC-CURRENT-BOUNDARY AC: No False Completion Claim
      STATEMENT: GHOST shall provide a projection and Prompt Builder capability that converts the current SuperPrompt state into retrieval-oriented projections, A3 comparison text, stage-visible engineered prompt previews, and the current final prompt_ready representation.

      This file shall define current implemented behavior through A4 and shall explicitly separate that behavior from the unfinished external LLM-call/send boundary, postponed A5 behavior, and future global Hard Rule integration.
    GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-CURRENT-GUI-OUTPUT
    11.1. Current Operational Output UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-CURRENT-GUI-OUTPUT STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-ROOT SuperPrompt Projection and Prompt Builder Scope
    STATEMENT: The current completed operational output of the provided Prompt Builder path shall be the GUI-visible engineered prompt stored in SuperPrompt.prompt_ready after A4.

      This file shall define current implemented behavior through A4 and shall explicitly separate that behavior from the unfinished external LLM-call/send boundary, postponed A5 behavior, and future global Hard Rule integration.
    GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-NO-SEND-IMPLEMENTATION
    11.2. No Completed External Send Boundary UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-NO-SEND-IMPLEMENTATION STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-ROOT SuperPrompt Projection and Prompt Builder Scope
    STATEMENT: The provided current code shall not be represented as implementing a completed action that sends prompt_ready to a selected external LLM and returns the resulting answer.

    GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-A5-POSTPONED
    11.3. A5 Postponed Boundary UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-A5-POSTPONED STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-ROOT SuperPrompt Projection and Prompt Builder Scope
    STATEMENT: A5 shall remain a reserved lifecycle value and postponed future capability.

    The current runner shall not claim a completed A5 execution step or a finalized A5 function.

    GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-HARD-RULE-POSTPONED
    11.4. Global Hard Rule Integration Postponed UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-HARD-RULE-POSTPONED STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-ROOT SuperPrompt Projection and Prompt Builder Scope
    STATEMENT: Global Hard Rule integration shall remain disabled and planned for later in the current runtime baseline.

    Per-agent static JSON instructions named Hard Rules shall not be confused with the future global Hard Rules capability.
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-ROOT
      1.1. SuperPrompt Projection and Prompt Builder Scope UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-ROOT STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
      • GHOST-CONTEXT-INTEGRATION-ROOT Context Integration and Prompt Assembly Scope
      RELATIONS (Child):
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-SOURCE-AUTHORITY Source-Code Authority
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-LEGACY-STUB Legacy PromptBuilder Stub Boundary
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-AUTHORITATIVE-STATE Authoritative Shared State
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-WRAPPER Stable Composition Wrapper
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-PROJECTOR-CONSTRUCTOR Projector Input Validation
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-DERIVED-LOGIC Derived Projection Logic Ownership
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-NO-STAGE-ALGORITHM-OWNERSHIP No Upstream Algorithm Ownership
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-QUERY-INPUTS Query Projection Inputs
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-A3-WRAPPER A3 Evaluation Wrapper
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-SYSTEM-HEADING System Section
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-CONFIG-SECTION Configuration Section
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-REQUEST-SECTION Current User Request Section
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-SUPPORT-SECTION Supporting Context Section
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-COMPOSE-SYSTEM System_MD Rebuild
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-COMPOSE-PROMPT Prompt_MD Rebuild
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-COMPOSE-ORDER prompt_ready Assembly Order
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-RUNNER-STEPS Current Executable Runner Steps
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-CURRENT-GUI-OUTPUT Current Operational Output
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-NO-SEND-IMPLEMENTATION No Completed External Send Boundary
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-A5-POSTPONED A5 Postponed Boundary
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-HARD-RULE-POSTPONED Global Hard Rule Integration Postponed
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-FUTURE-SEND-SAME-ASSEMBLY Future Send Uses Authoritative Assembly
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-FUTURE-NO-API-INVENTION No Invented Send API
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-NO-MISSING-CONTEXT-FABRICATION Missing Context Omission
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-NO-RAW-MEMORY-LEAK No Default Raw Memory Leakage
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-STRUCTURE-SAFETY Raw Evidence Structural Safety
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-NO-DURABLE-MUTATION No Durable Store Mutation
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-AC-ORDER AC: Composition Order
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-AC-A4-RAW-HIDDEN AC: Raw Document Evidence Hidden After A4
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-AC-RAW-MEMORY-HIDDEN AC: Raw Memory Hidden
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-AC-RUNNER AC: Runner Through A4
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-AC-CURRENT-BOUNDARY AC: No False Completion Claim
      STATEMENT: GHOST shall provide a projection and Prompt Builder capability that converts the current SuperPrompt state into retrieval-oriented projections, A3 comparison text, stage-visible engineered prompt previews, and the current final prompt_ready representation.

      This file shall define current implemented behavior through A4 and shall explicitly separate that behavior from the unfinished external LLM-call/send boundary, postponed A5 behavior, and future global Hard Rule integration.
    GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-FUTURE-SEND-SAME-ASSEMBLY
    11.5. Future Send Uses Authoritative Assembly UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-FUTURE-SEND-SAME-ASSEMBLY STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-ROOT SuperPrompt Projection and Prompt Builder Scope
    STATEMENT: The approved future direction is that the actual model-call/send boundary shall consume the same authoritative deterministic prompt assembly represented to the user, so final-send content does not silently diverge from the inspectable engineered prompt.
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-ROOT

    GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-FUTURE-NO-API-INVENTION
    11.6. No Invented Send API UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-FUTURE-NO-API-INVENTION STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-ROOT SuperPrompt Projection and Prompt Builder Scope
    STATEMENT: This document shall not invent the future model-provider API, model-selection contract, streaming behavior, response-capture behavior, retry policy, or failure semantics before those decisions are implemented or explicitly approved.

    GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-NO-MISSING-CONTEXT-FABRICATION
    12.1. Missing Context Omission UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-NO-MISSING-CONTEXT-FABRICATION STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-ROOT SuperPrompt Projection and Prompt Builder Scope
    STATEMENT: Projection shall omit empty Memory Context, empty S_CTX_MD, absent ActiveBrief content, and absent attachment content rather than invent replacements.

    GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-NO-RAW-MEMORY-LEAK
    12.2. No Default Raw Memory Leakage UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-NO-RAW-MEMORY-LEAK STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-ROOT SuperPrompt Projection and Prompt Builder Scope
    STATEMENT: Normal prompt_ready rendering shall not expose raw memory episodes, raw semantic-memory chunks, or memory debug Markdown merely because they exist in MemoryContextPack or extras.

    GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-STRUCTURE-SAFETY
    12.3. Raw Evidence Structural Safety UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-STRUCTURE-SAFETY STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-ROOT SuperPrompt Projection and Prompt Builder Scope
    STATEMENT: Raw retrieved document text shown in the engineered prompt shall use the current sanitization path so source headings and structural markers do not compete with the outer SuperPrompt structure.

    GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-NO-DURABLE-MUTATION
    12.4. No Durable Store Mutation UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-NO-DURABLE-MUTATION STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-ROOT SuperPrompt Projection and Prompt Builder Scope
    STATEMENT: SuperPrompt projection and prompt_ready composition shall not write durable document or memory stores.

      This file shall define current implemented behavior through A4 and shall explicitly separate that behavior from the unfinished external LLM-call/send boundary, postponed A5 behavior, and future global Hard Rule integration.
    GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-AC-ORDER
    13.1. AC: Composition Order UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-AC-ORDER STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-ROOT SuperPrompt Projection and Prompt Builder Scope
    STATEMENT: Given a SuperPrompt containing non-empty system/configuration, current request, Memory Context, S_CTX_MD, and Attachments_MD, compose_prompt_ready shall place them in the order System/Configuration, Current User Request, Supporting Context, and Attachments.
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-ROOT
      1.1. SuperPrompt Projection and Prompt Builder Scope UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-ROOT STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
      • GHOST-CONTEXT-INTEGRATION-ROOT Context Integration and Prompt Assembly Scope
      RELATIONS (Child):
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-SOURCE-AUTHORITY Source-Code Authority
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-LEGACY-STUB Legacy PromptBuilder Stub Boundary
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-AUTHORITATIVE-STATE Authoritative Shared State
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-WRAPPER Stable Composition Wrapper
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-PROJECTOR-CONSTRUCTOR Projector Input Validation
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-DERIVED-LOGIC Derived Projection Logic Ownership
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-NO-STAGE-ALGORITHM-OWNERSHIP No Upstream Algorithm Ownership
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-QUERY-INPUTS Query Projection Inputs
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-A3-WRAPPER A3 Evaluation Wrapper
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-SYSTEM-HEADING System Section
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-CONFIG-SECTION Configuration Section
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-REQUEST-SECTION Current User Request Section
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-SUPPORT-SECTION Supporting Context Section
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-COMPOSE-SYSTEM System_MD Rebuild
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-COMPOSE-PROMPT Prompt_MD Rebuild
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-COMPOSE-ORDER prompt_ready Assembly Order
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-RUNNER-STEPS Current Executable Runner Steps
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-CURRENT-GUI-OUTPUT Current Operational Output
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-NO-SEND-IMPLEMENTATION No Completed External Send Boundary
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-A5-POSTPONED A5 Postponed Boundary
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-HARD-RULE-POSTPONED Global Hard Rule Integration Postponed
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-FUTURE-SEND-SAME-ASSEMBLY Future Send Uses Authoritative Assembly
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-FUTURE-NO-API-INVENTION No Invented Send API
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-NO-MISSING-CONTEXT-FABRICATION Missing Context Omission
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-NO-RAW-MEMORY-LEAK No Default Raw Memory Leakage
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-STRUCTURE-SAFETY Raw Evidence Structural Safety
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-NO-DURABLE-MUTATION No Durable Store Mutation
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-AC-ORDER AC: Composition Order
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-AC-A4-RAW-HIDDEN AC: Raw Document Evidence Hidden After A4
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-AC-RAW-MEMORY-HIDDEN AC: Raw Memory Hidden
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-AC-RUNNER AC: Runner Through A4
      • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-AC-CURRENT-BOUNDARY AC: No False Completion Claim
      STATEMENT: GHOST shall provide a projection and Prompt Builder capability that converts the current SuperPrompt state into retrieval-oriented projections, A3 comparison text, stage-visible engineered prompt previews, and the current final prompt_ready representation.

      This file shall define current implemented behavior through A4 and shall explicitly separate that behavior from the unfinished external LLM-call/send boundary, postponed A5 behavior, and future global Hard Rule integration.
    GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-AC-A4-RAW-HIDDEN
    13.2. AC: Raw Document Evidence Hidden After A4 UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-AC-A4-RAW-HIDDEN STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-ROOT SuperPrompt Projection and Prompt Builder Scope
    STATEMENT: Given stage a4 and non-empty S_CTX_MD, normal prompt_ready rendering shall show Retrieved Project Evidence Summary and shall not show raw retrieved document chunks.

    GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-AC-RAW-MEMORY-HIDDEN
    13.3. AC: Raw Memory Hidden UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-AC-RAW-MEMORY-HIDDEN STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-ROOT SuperPrompt Projection and Prompt Builder Scope
    STATEMENT: Given a populated MemoryContextPack and non-empty synthesized Memory Context, normal prompt_ready rendering shall show the synthesized Memory Context and shall not show raw memory candidates by default.

    GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-AC-RUNNER
    13.4. AC: Runner Through A4 UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-AC-RUNNER STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-ROOT SuperPrompt Projection and Prompt Builder Scope
    STATEMENT: Given valid prompt input, an active project, configured controller components, and no stage failure, the current Prompt Builder runner shall complete the six executable steps through A4, preserve stage snapshots, and leave the latest engineered prompt in SuperPrompt.prompt_ready and GUI session state.
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-ROOT

    GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-AC-CURRENT-BOUNDARY
    13.5. AC: No False Completion Claim UID: GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-AC-CURRENT-BOUNDARY STATUS: Draft RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-SP-PROJECTION-ROOT SuperPrompt Projection and Prompt Builder Scope
    STATEMENT: Inspection of the provided current code shall not identify a live global Hard Rule engine, completed A5 stage, dedicated operational PromptBuilder class, or completed external LLM-call/send action after prompt_ready composition.
